# Build AI agents that work for you | Notion

Agents that work while you sleep.
---------------------------------

Automate repetitive tasks

![Chat window with custom agent "TaskBot" updating integrations under the request of "Whenever I get a new request assigned to me add it to my task list"](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FWorhqtgmEUZM9bDNS8WGV%2F7f644793ec03e5f629d153ab2edbabcf%2FCustomAgents_-_Tasks_2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Streamline specific workflows

![custom agent window for Emily's Daily Summary showing customization through chat, settings, and activity for that custom agent](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4tk49tTC2TJmVFSVyTWfKh%2F7f1d1042ee1de7494e14275ebf4884fc%2FCustomAgents-Workflows_2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Create and share them across your workspace

![Agents window showing custom agent libary across workspace](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7enciQpuouZPfqECeXkUv1%2F0cdf97046d7bdeccd337f652fb87fd1d%2FCustomAgents-Workspace_2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Questions & answers
-------------------

When will Custom Agents launch?

We're excited to bring Custom Agents to Notion soon! We're currently in alpha and refining the experience based on user feedback. We'll notify you when Custom Agents become more widely available.

When will I hear back?

Thanks for your interest! We'll review all submissions and reach out as we expand access to Custom Agents. In the meantime, you can start using Notion Agent today. It’s available now on Business and Enterprise plans and can handle many of the same workflows. Users on Free and Plus will be able to try it out.

Try asking Notion Agent to help you with [new hire onboarding](http://dev.notion.so/?target=agent.business.website)
, or [show you what it can do](http://dev.notion.so/?target=agent.personal.website)
.

I'm excited about Custom Agents. What should I do now?

Great! Here's what you can do:

*   **Start with Notion Agent today** – Available now on Business and Enterprise plans, Notion Agent can handle many powerful workflows like compiling feedback, generating reports, and building databases. The main difference is you prompt it each time instead of it running automatically.
    
*   **Explore use cases** – Check out our [use case library](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases)
     to see what's possible with Notion AI
    
*   **Stay tuned** – We'll keep you updated as Custom Agents become available
    

How are Custom Agents different from the Notion Agent in the bottom right corner?

**Notion Agent** is your personal AI assistant that's available now. It completes complex, multi-step tasks from a single prompt—like creating databases, analyzing data, and generating reports. You work with it through chat whenever you need it.

**Custom Agents** (coming soon) can run automatically on schedules or triggers, can be shared across your team, and have more granular permissions.

The good news: Most workflows you're imagining for Custom Agents can be accomplished with Notion Agent today—you'll just prompt it each time instead of it running automatically.

Questions & Answers
-------------------

How does Notion AI search across multiple apps?

Using AI connectors, Notion AI performs internal knowledge search by indexing content from your work tools based on your permissions. When you ask a question, it searches Slack messages, files and PDFs in Google Drive, Jira tickets, GitHub Issues & Pull Requests, and other connected apps to deliver the most relevant information—fast.

Which tools can I connect to Notion AI?

You can integrate apps like Slack, Google Drive, GitHub, Jira, MSFT Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive today with others coming soon: Linear, Gmail, Salesforce, Zendesk, Box and more. These integrations enable a true unified search experience across all your internal and external knowledge sources.

Is Notion AI secure?

Yes. Notion AI only shows information you have permission to access. It follows strict security standards like SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, and CCPA compliance, with zero data retention for enterprise users. Read more about our [enterprise search security and privacy practices](https://www.notion.com/help/enterprise-search-security-and-privacy-practices.)

Can Notion AI create reports from multiple sources?

Absolutely. With Research Mode, Notion AI analyzes data from your connected apps and the web to generate detailed, ready-to-share reports—saving teams days of manual research.

Can I choose which sources Notion AI searches?

Yes. You control where and how Notion AI searches by selecting which apps, documents, and web sources to include—giving you full control over your search experience.

How is Notion AI different from traditional enterprise search tools?

Unlike traditional search, Notion AI doesn't just find files—it understands questions, retrieves up-to-date answers with citations, and even uses critical thinking to analyze complex questions and generate detailed research reports in minutes.

# EU Data Act FAQ | Notion

EU Data Act


===============

Understand your data portability rights and how to exercise them as an EU customer.

### General Questions

What is the Data Act?

The EU Data Act refers to Regulation (EU) 2023/2854, which provides data portability rights to customers of digital services in the European Union.

Who can exercise rights under the Data Act?

Notion customers located in the European Union can exercise rights under the Data Act.

If you are a customer located outside of the European Union then the Data Act does not apply to your contract.

What rights do I have under the Data Act?

The Data Act allows Notion customers located in the European Union to, among other things:

• Switch to a Data Processing Service of the same service type as Notion • Switch to an On-Premise ICT Infrastructure • Erase their Exportable Data

How can I exercise my rights under the Data Act?

EU Customers can exercise their rights to Switch services or to erase their Exportable Data under the Data Act by:

• Executing a valid Data Act Addendum to their Master Services Agreement or Personal Use Terms of Service, and • Then submitting a valid Data Act Switching Request Form to Notion support.

To obtain a Data Act Addendum to your contract, please contact Notion's support team. The process for submitting a Data Act Switching Request Form is explained in the Data Act Addendum.

What is a Data Act Addendum?

The Data Act Addendum is a legal document incorporated into your contract (i.e. Notion's Master Services Agreement or Personal Use Terms of Service) that outlines the terms for customers' rights under the EU Data Act, particularly regarding data portability and switching between service providers.

To obtain a Data Act Addendum to your contract, please contact Notion's support team.

How much notice do Customers have to give of their intention to exercise their rights under the Data Act?

Customers have to provide Notion with 60 days' notice of their intention to exercise their rights under the Data Act by submitting a valid Data Act Switching Request Form to Notion.

### Switching

What if I have a fixed-term Subscription and want to Switch before it ends?

You can still Switch services in the middle of your Subscription Term under the Data Act even if you have a fixed-term Subscription.

How long should the Switching process take once it is initiated?

The Switching process should take no more than 30 days once it has been initiated after the 60 day notice period. If for some reason it will take longer than this, Notion will inform you and extend the Switching period accordingly.

Can I extend the period for Switching myself?

Yes, if 30 days is not long enough, you may contact Notion support to extend the Switching period on a one-time basis for a period that is more appropriate.

What assistance will Notion provide during the Switching process?

Notion will provide reasonable assistance through its self-service export feature and API access, which are free of charge. These Export Features will allow you to access your Exportable Data in a structured, commonly-used and machine-readable format.

Where can I find information about Notion's Export Features?

Please see information about Notion's [self service export feature](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/www.notion.com/help/export-your-content%7D%7D)
 and access to [Notion's API](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/developers.notion.com/%7D%7D)
. These Export Features are both provided free of charge. These allow the export of your Exportable Data in PDF, CSV, or HTML format.

What happens after the Switching process is over?

After the Switching process has concluded your contract with Notion will automatically terminate.

How long can I access my data after the Switching process?

You may retrieve your Exportable Data for a period of thirty (30) days after the Switching process has ended.

Can a third party submit a Switching request on my behalf?

Yes, a Request for Switching may be submitted by a third party authorized by you, but the Request must include proof of your authorization.

### Erasure of Exportable Data

What happens after I request to erase my Exportable Data under the Data Act?

Your contract with Notion will automatically terminate sixty (60) days after Notion receives and verifies a valid request from you to delete your Exportable Data.

When does Notion delete Exportable Data after I submit a Data Act Switching Request Form for erasure of my Exportable Data under the Data Act?

After you delete your workspace(s) using the self-service workspace deletion feature available [here](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/www.notion.com/help/delete-a-workspace%7D%7D)
, Notion will ensure full deletion of all of your Exportable Data.

### Charges

Can Notion charge any fees for Switching?

Notion may charge Switching fees for any Switching Request made before 12 January 2027. This is explained in more detail in the Data Act Addendum.

Can Notion charge any fees for terminating my contract under the Data Act?

Where customers terminate their contract with Notion under the Data Act, Notion will charge an early termination fee equal to the Subscription Fees that would have accrued until the end of the agreed Subscription Term.

### Technical Questions

Where can I find the transparency information that Notion is required to provide under the Data Act?

Notion provides transparency information on Exportable Data, Switching procedures, data residency and technical specifications in Notion's [Documentation](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/www.notion.com/help%7D%7D)
, DPA and [Security Standards](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/www.notion.com/help/security-and-privacy%7D%7D)
. This is explained in more detail in the Data Act Addendum.

What data is portable under the Notion Data Act Addendum?

A customer's workspace is considered Exportable Data under the Data Act Addendum. The workspace contains data inputted into Notion by a customer as well as data generated by a customer through their use of Notion.

Exportable Data includes certain metadata about your workspace as well as Input and Output from Notion AI.

Does Notion have any Digital Assets for customers to port?

No, Notion does not have any Digital Assets of customers.

What tools does Notion make available in order to facilitate Customer Switching?

Notion provides its [self service export feature](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/www.notion.com/help/export-your-content%7D%7D)
 and access to [Notion's API](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/developers.notion.com/%7D%7D)
, both free of charge, to allow the export of Customer content in PDF, CSV, or HTML format.

What data is excluded from the Switching process?

"Exempted Assets/Data" as defined by the Data Act are not applicable to Notion's Switching process.

Does Notion delete Exportable Data after Switching is complete?

Yes, Notion confirms the data deletion period in the Data Act Addendum, provided that the Customer takes action to delete their Notion Workspace using the self-service workspace deletion feature available [here](https://www.notion.com/__mdpb/%7B%7Bhttps:/www.notion.com/help/delete-a-workspace%7D%7D)
.

Can Customers continue to use Notion after initiating a Request to Switch?

Customers can use Notion during the 60 day period after they have provided notice to Switch, and for 30 days during the Switching process. Customers can also still access their data for a 30 day Retrieval Period after the Switching process is over. After the Retrieval Period, Customer's contracts with Notion and their access to Notion will terminate.

**If Customers would like to reactivate their contract with Notion or back out of Switching, they should contact their Account Executive to discuss.**

What measures can Customers continue to use Notion after initiating a Request to Switch?

Customers can use Notion during the 60 day period after they have provided notice to Switch, and for 30 days during the Switching process. Customers can also still access their data for a 30 day Retrieval Period after the Switching process is over. After the Retrieval Period, Customer's contracts with Notion and their access to Notion will terminate.

**If Customers would like to reactivate their contract with Notion or back out of Switching, they should contact their Account Executive to discuss.**

What measures does Notion take to prevent international governmental access to EU data?

Technical, organizational, and contractual measures to prevent international governmental access to non-personal data held in the EU can be found in Section 3.10 of the Notion DPA, Annex II of the Notion DPA, and the Notion Security Standards.

---

# Join Notion Solutions Partner Program | Notion

Become a Solutions Partner.


===============================

Build opportunities. Ship outcomes. Deliver value. All with Notion.

[Become a partner](https://www.notion.so/profile/services)

![Two illustrated people working together](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6WJRIQuzNWB8W7qQehKDj9%2F0eef7f7335b42033e5ab3172900d2dd4%2FCharacter_illustration_duo_with_shapes.png&w=1920&q=75)

One program. Two ways to engage.
--------------------------------

Pick the engagement path that fits your practice—or do both.

![Scaffolding illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1RotvrvgavvdtZS1kWsAjh%2Fd0477d17a67874c980cc7ffde20db380%2FScaffolding.png&w=1920&q=75)

Sell

You help customers choose Notion and buy with confidence. Designed for resellers, VARs, and sales-led consultancies focused on new and expansion deals.

*   What you do:
*   Source new client opportunities
    
*   Help customers find the right Notion offering
    
*   Collaborate with Notion's team on co-selling
    
*   Guide deals through to completion
    

[Become a Sales Partner →](https://www.notion.so/profile/services)

Service

You help customers unlock Notion's full potential-from start to finish. Designed for system integrators, agencies, and independent consultants.

*   What you do:
*   Conduct discovery sessions and design planning
    
*   Execute implementation and data migration
    
*   Build integrations and workflow automations
    
*   Provide training and change management support
    

[Become a Consulting Partner →](https://www.notion.so/profile/services)

Get the resources you need to succeed.
--------------------------------------

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FchartLine.png&w=256&q=75)

Revenue

Recurring partner margin on license resale, Notion-sourced projects and subcontracting

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FanswersFinal.png&w=256&q=75)

Support

Priority support, beta access to new features, and full API docs for custom integrations

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FhammerWrench.png&w=256&q=75)

Enablement

Comprehensive training, sales tools, and a dedicated partner success manager

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FbookClosed1.png&w=256&q=75)

Solutions Kits

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2Fmegaphone2.png&w=256&q=75)

Joint campaigns, case studies, and inclusion in Notion’s partner directory

![Notion logo](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/1XDrBlBhttaDBW7OsSIHVJ/0a86cf7c5a22e558fa724f691dfa6c02/affirm-logo-color.svg)

**Nora Grasham**Senior Director, IT Engineering

Leading companies get faster business results with an expert partner.
---------------------------------------------------------------------

From startups to enterprises, companies all around the world have turned Notion into working systems that scale with certified experts guiding the way.

[See how →](https://www.notion.com/customers/solutions-partners)

![Collaboration illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5SqcMNkFc0BZI2gs0ozAFi%2F981b2e82ba2c1cd8a18aca84a792f1ec%2FMetaphoric-Spots_collaboration2_blue_2.png&w=1920&q=75)

Questions & answers
-------------------

What’s the process to become a Solutions Partner?

The first step is to create your partner profile, accept the Solutions Partner Agreement, and submit your application. Our team will review it, and once approved, you’ll be eligible to complete the required certifications to become a Solutions Partner. [Get started here.](https://www.notion.so/profile/services)

My application was approved, what should I do next?

Once you’re approved, your next step is to complete the required certifications for your track. Passing these will unlock your badges and credentials and officially confirm your status as a Solutions Partner. After that, you’ll just need to finalize your profile so you can be listed in the directory.

What does it take to become a successful partner?

Successful partners build a focused Notion practice around their strengths. They invest in certifications, package repeatable offerings, deliver measurable outcomes, and execute consistently. Explore partner stories [here](https://www.notion.com/customers/solutions-partners)
 to get inspired.

I am a company looking to hire a Solution Partner, how do I get started?

Start by browsing the [partner directory](https://www.notion.com/solutions-partners)
. Look for partners who serve your region and language and provide the type of work you need. Once you’ve found a good match, reach out to schedule a discovery call to explore fit.

What is the difference between a Sales Partner and a Consulting Partner?

We have two partner types in the Solutions Partner Program: Sales Partners and Consulting Partners.

*   Sales Partners focus on driving revenue through activities like sourcing new customers, facilitating expansions, managing renewals, and providing account oversight.
    
*   Consulting Partners help customers adopt and scale with Notion by delivering services such as consulting, implementation, integrations, training, or ongoing managed support.
    

A partner can take on one or both roles. Each type also has its own tiers, with distinct benefits and requirements.

# What’s New – Notion

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/releases/releases-illustration.png)

What’s New
==========

Keep up with the latest releases, improvements, and fixes.

February 9, 2026

[Claude Opus 4.6, now in Notion\
------------------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2026-02-09)

Claude Opus 4.6 is the strongest model Anthropic has shipped. It takes complicated requests and actually follows through, breaking them into concrete steps, executing, and producing polished work even when the task is ambitious. For Notion users, it feels less like a tool and more like a capable collaborator.

February 4, 2026

[Search your Asana tasks and projects from Notion\
------------------------------------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2026-02-04)

![Asana AI Connector](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4GT4xTvZRXbvXRIWCL3c5C%2F955b0c821ed5189b1a9d7a0bc88c76aa%2FAsana_AI_Connector__1_.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Your Notion Agent can now find Asana projects and tasks in seconds. Ask things like “Show me overdue tasks, grouped by assignee” or “List open tasks for Project X and flag what’s blocked.”

Use it to check status, spot what needs attention, and see what’s coming up next, all without leaving Notion. Everything respects your existing Asana permissions.

[Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/help/asana-ai-connector)

January 20, 20263.2

[Notion 3.2: Mobile AI, new models, people directory\
---------------------------------------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2026-01-20)

First round of 2026 updates is in! This release helps Notion fit into your world even better. Work on the go, choose your AI models, track what matters to your team.

### AI Notes on mobile

![AI Notes on mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/6XZZh0mf2GEhfeMUJoHVO8/5fcfdbb169778f44b9983f12c0158164/AI-MeetingNotes-V3.gif)

Whether you’re joining a call while commuting, brainstorming on your morning walk, or meeting without laptops, everything just works on mobile the way you’d hope. One tap starts AI note transcriptions (even when you switch apps or lock your screen) and summarizes everything into clear summaries, action items, and shareable docs in seconds.

### **Your Agent fits in your pocket**

![Your Agent fits in your pocket](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4pUcFp2Ym0ftJU1mYUuj1O%2Ff0255b3da90f02bb3d34d31eba2d1b0c%2F01_AI_better_on_mobile.png&w=3840&q=75)

Everything your Notion Agent can do on desktop, it now does on your phone. Build forms, create databases, search your company’s brain. Think of an item on your to-do list, hand it off to your agent, and it will work in the background while you move onto your next task. No more waiting. Here’s a [live demo](https://x.com/akothari/status/2007140306677055931?s=20)
 of what Notion Agent can do.

### New models, same memory

![New models, same memory](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4xUt6BfR1pTAgQbrlggzn3%2F7e4ea008eb7453a6f1adc833dc67e971%2FAI_Models.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

When a new model drops, it’s ready in Notion. You can now pick from GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, or Gemini 3. Or let **Auto** select the best model for the job. Switch between them freely while your context stays with you. Models will continue to change, but your memory in Notion doesn’t.

### Understand how your team uses Notion AI

![Understand how your team uses Notion AI ](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3MSFoTAKJO1Xo3UxbxQ7kE%2F8a700f1e6e18985536867518fe50483c%2FAI_analytics.png&w=3840&q=75)

Understand how your team uses Notion AI

Enterprise admins now have clear visibility into AI usage over time. See who’s using it most, which features drive engagement, and where AI delivers value. Go to **Settings** → **Analytics** → **AI** to access. More insights coming soon.

### **People Directory**

![People Directory ](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7MnFOiiWDhG1Qo0Ya9evSk%2Ff458e573bd0f2d5a2d405009bd2d62e4%2FPeople_Directory.png&w=3840&q=75)

People Directory

The new People Directory shows everyone in your workspace. It’s a pre-built database you can customize or import from HR systems ([learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/people-directory)
). Check it out by searching for “People” or go to **Settings** → **Members** → **View People Directory** (it’s on the top right).

### Do more with Notion & Jira

![Do more with Notion & Jira](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3GwRh2toJNqELMkofYwzhT%2F82fe0c7d1b31a27c5a3663da5f5c0e26%2F06_Notion_and_Jira.png&w=3840&q=75)

The improved Jira integration is for teams where engineers live in Jira, but everyone else plans in Notion. Sync development work from Jira, then add your own Notion properties right alongside it—quarterly goals, customer feedback, revenue impact. Build dashboards that combine both, so you see the full picture. On Enterprise, edit key Jira fields directly from Notion and sync changes back automatically.

### Multi-account on Notion Mail

![Multi-account on Notion Mail](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2H3lLe9ukWIcd9OU99eQXx%2F63c27bb8c1cb054e69a5da4692bf0d6d%2FMulti_Account_Mail.png&w=3840&q=75)

Manage multiple email addresses under one Notion account. Switch between personal and work inboxes easily. A lot of you have been waiting for this one, so thank you for your patience. We hope you [give Notion Mail try](https://www.notion.com/help/get-started-with-notion-mail#download-notion-mail)
!

### **More improvements**

*   **Big desktop performance improvements:** Pages on Windows open 27% faster, Mac desktop is up +11%. [This chart](https://x.com/ivanhzhao/status/2001834160198197305?s=20)
     is one of our most meaningful from 2025. It shows pages now load in ⅓ less time. And we’ll keep improving!
    
*   **Hide Calendar panel**: You can hide the context panel now for a full view of your calendar ([see the demo](https://x.com/NotionCalendar/status/1995939070154080553?s=20)
    ).
    
*   **Mail to Notion pages:** Save emails directly to Notion pages for project documentation and reference.
    
*   **In-page find knows diacritics**: Searching on a page for words with accents like “café” or “naïve” now works exactly how you’'d expect.
    
*   **Confetti effect in automations**: Add a little celebration for your automations — like [this](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthiasfrankprofile_so-i-guess-this-just-happened-notion-activity-7407336436582068224-Yzh3?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAASwbfgBDD6e1rYFMC4ggWjFn4pUkVaN0Vw)
    !
    
*   **Notion MCP improvements for Enterprise:** Track MCP activity in audit logs and query multiple databases. Soon, you’ll also be able to control which external AI tools can connect to your workspace.
    

P.S. Last year brought Agents, AI notes, enterprise search, offline mode, database permissions, and 90+ features. Here’s a database with [everything released in 2025](https://notion.notion.site/2025)
.

December 3, 2025

[Agent can build forms\
---------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2025-12-03)

[Gemini 3 Pro is live\
--------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2025-11-19)

November 17, 20253.1

[Notion 3.1\
----------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2025-11-17)

With Notion 3.0, you met your Notion Agent—our biggest update yet.

Now, your Agent can analyze page comments, calendars, and private Slack messages and take action on CSVs. It gets all the context, and you don’t have to copy‑paste.

Meeting notes also got its biggest upgrade, including a new home in your sidebar.

Finally, pages are loading 15% faster. It’s a strong start to 3.0!  

### **A new home for all your meetings**

![AI Meeting Notes new home in the sidebar](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/6vdXd8SNGdJcg3r1Mljuqb/866ddfcaf10d6fe1780255265163ad51/01_A_new_home_for_your_meetings.gif)

Too often, notes get scattered (or forgotten). The new Meetings tab in your sidebar organizes notes from every meeting you’ve run or joined. It syncs with your calendar so you can easily prep notes, join calls, and use AI Meeting Notes to transcribe every detail. Just type `/meet` on any page and click start to kick off a meeting note. [Check it out →](http://notion.so/meet)
.

### Get the full context from meeting summaries

![Now you can go to the exact moment in the transcript for every takeaway](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2r25nNXIYe1FMGkY5UCqRp%2Ff7205e73b819490a464cb5fcda0dcc67%2F02_Meeting_Summaries__V3_.png&w=3840&q=75)

AI Meeting Notes summaries now links each takeaway to the exact moment in the transcript, so you can jump straight to the source. It’s great for understanding how decisions were made, catching up on meetings you missed, or handing off action items with the full context.

### Agent analyzes comments and CSVs

![Agent can now read and take action on comments and uploaded CSVs](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/7x2jr7q2JrhjMuuwzPZJYw/1afaf9285d4c684dc9dd5b2db03daa43/03_CSVs__V3___2_.gif)

Now your Agent can read comments and version history when answering questions and drafting updates. This makes it easy to summarize feedback and page updates, or just ask your Agent to make edits from a comment, like “implement Holly’s feedback,” and it will update the doc. You can also upload a CSV and turn it into a database, or ask your Agent to analyze the file and surface the answers you need. Big upgrades (with more soon)!

### Your calendar is now searchable

![Connect your Google and Notion Calendars with Notion AI for better Enterprise Search results.](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F9fbfuFg54GeygDrWm0VTT%2F327e4627d3c5d889f0fd935cdcf3ea94%2F04__Connect_Calendars.png&w=3840&q=75)

Notion AI can now search your Google and Notion Calendars, making it easier for your Agent to help you manage your day. Get quick help with meeting prep or analyzing your schedule. Try “Brief me on my schedule for the next week” or “When did I last meet with Steven and what were the action items?” [Connect your calendar →](https://notion.so/?target=ai)

### Search private Slack messages

![Now you can search private channels and DM's with the upgraded Slack AI Connector](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7DifxxTIElSB0w1oTFuLee%2F7f5049ad21388770ef15ba915907a3ce%2F05_Private_Slack_Messages__tag_.png&w=3840&q=75)

Our Slack AI Connector got a nice upgrade. It now supports private channels and Direct Messages, giving you even better search results and your Agent more helpful context. As always, all Slack permissions are respected.

### Place it on the map view

![Databases now have a Map view and Place property](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/17Nt38aNjAjrSK6b7Tg9Vy/3a7d42b3c017e587c398b33de644743d/06_Map_View_Team_Offsite.gif)

Need to track addresses or map locations? The new [map view and place property](https://www.notion.com/help/maps)
 in databases is for you. Whether you’re planning your next company event or your regional office expansion, map view brings it to life. You can also ask your Agent to add a place property and update an existing database with locations and watch the magic happen.

### Less load time, more work time

![Pages now load 15% faster and navigating between pages on mobile and desktop are faster](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/56DAx8Px63Cl8RoejTCkw6/9246b2c369c08617c642852cd638c6f3/07_Less_load_time__V2_.gif)

Pages are loading 15% faster! Navigating between pages on desktop and mobile is quicker than ever. Performance matters to you—and we’re on it.

### Other updates we’re excited about

*   Restrict logins to approved IP addresses. This is an important and common request! [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/help/ip-address-restrictions)
    
*   The new [database conditional coloring](https://www.notion.com/help/database-properties#conditional-color)
     now supports formulas, relations, and rollups.
    
*   Database filtering now supports sub-items to see exactly what matters.
    
*   When a teammate reacts to your comment with an emoji, you’ll see quick notification (like [this](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1981412603134959880)
    ).
    
*   Create a two-way sync with Notion Calendar and your databases! Now you can [edit text properties](https://x.com/NotionCalendar/status/1981053806260711778)
    , like descriptions, in Calendar.
    
*   The Figma × Notion MCP integration is live! Here’s [a demo](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1975654723887026485)
     that connects Figma Make to a Notion Product Requirements Doc to build a prototype.
    
*   You can now create pages from your database templates [with the Notion API](https://x.com/NotionAPI/status/1980729685609967656)
    .
    
*   Stay on the lookout for seasonal Agent accessories—[like these](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1978144571595936199)
     for Halloween!
    

November 14, 2025

-----------------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2025-11-14)

It’s now easier to review the latest comments when collaborating with your team. This simplified view of page discussions lets you navigate to recent comments, identify what's new, and mark comments to return to later.

### Inbox made simpler

![New grouped notifications in your inbox provide a more compact, readable layout. This gives a more focused view of what needs attention, with quick access to the latest comments.](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2cYVBid5LdTYjc6G4JZyMI%2F67d8713ee2734ddf8027dc4d11eaa1d5%2FInboxUpdate.png&w=3840&q=75)

November 10, 2025

[Agent now reads CSVs\
--------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2025-11-10)

![](https://www.notion.com/releases)

Play

Uh-oh! It looks like your ad blocker is preventing the video from playing.

Please watch it on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JVxg89yEYp8)

September 18, 20253.0

[Notion 3.0: Agents\
------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2025-09-18)

Notion 3.0 is here! We’ve rebuilt Notion AI from the ground up as Agents.

Now, anything you can do in Notion, your Agent can do for you. It’s the most advanced knowledge work agent in the world. It’s capable of over 20 minutes of multi‑step actions with a state‑of‑the‑art memory system (using Notion pages and databases).

With Notion 1.0 and 2.0, we gave you the tools to do your work in one place. With 3.0, you get Agents that do the work for you, so you can reclaim time and focus on building your life’s work.  

### Anything you can do in Notion, your Agent can do (across dozens of pages at once)

![bug tracking](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/35pvuyGhPgb9vrUDq4Gvpw/4299146d65d92304c0d8854f0a2e05b1/September2025_WhatsNew_BugTracker__1_.gif)

So how is this different from what Notion AI already does? Think of it as a complete upgrade. **Your personal Agent can take on a whole project**, like building a launch plan, breaking it into tasks, assigning them, and even drafting docs to give your team a head start.

With databases, it works at a scale no person could—updating or creating hundreds of pages at once. **Ben Levick, the Head of AI & Ops at Ramp, put it perfectly: “We can now instantly spin up ready-to-use systems that used to take hours of busywork. Then we use those Notion Agents to power whole new workflows at scale.”**

Your personal Agent pulls context from your workspace, connected tools like Slack, Google Drive, and GitHub, and even the web (always within your permissions) so the work it delivers feels made for you. The use cases are nearly endless, but [here are a few standouts](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases)
.

### Personalize your Agent’s instructions and memory

![memory](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4EnXTbNX2EKImhCXGJ8M38%2F98dea658117285e4328c387d286e4486%2FSeptember2025_WhatsNew_AgentPersonalization__1_.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

**“It’s like a coworker that’s been around and has genuine context.”** That’s how Faire Product Manager Harsha Yeddanupudy described it, and it’s exactly what makes memory the most powerful (and fun!) part of Agent. Give your Agent an instructions page so it feels like a teammate who knows _your_ work and style. Tell it how you like things written, what to reference, and even where to file tasks and it’ll do the work your way. Best of all, it remembers over time, so you don’t have to keep repeating yourself.

### Make it cute (no, really)

![personalization](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/4lJsP0Boyx2tzTYv99yL0X/08ec57bc7cbe9445337d33f5bbadbd35/September2025_WhatsNew_NoseyPersonalization.gif)

Imagine a whole team of Agents, each with their own specialty, running on autopilot. Soon, you’ll be able to build any Custom Agent your team needs. One to wrangle customer feedback, one to post weekly project updates, one to handle IT requests … your Agents have it covered.

Unlike your personal Agent, Custom Agents can run autonomously on a schedule or triggers you set, so work keeps moving even while you’re asleep. Just like your personal Agent, Custom Agents follow your instructions and permissions, so you’re always in control. If you want to learn more about Custom Agents, [sign up here](https://notion.notion.site/26fefdeead05803ca7a6cd2cdd7d112f)
 and we’ll be in touch!

### Database row permissions are here!

![database row permissions](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FGhiaf2cfDzdcG0lAVOHOI%2F20632c1734ed58ac41f63a06086b6791%2Fimage__1___3_.png&w=3840&q=75)

Now you can control exactly who sees each row in your database with page-level access. Keep tasks visible to who they’re assigned to, collaborate easily with consultants and clients, and keep sensitive company info from getting in the wrong hands—all while maintaining a source of truth for your team. Available for Business and Enterprise plans. [Learn more →](http://notion.com/help/sharing-and-permissions#database-page-level-access)

### **Give AI the context it needs with AI connectors**

![ai connectors](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4SAOSlcln2OISoDvW9E714%2F8ecf7b15d5c9b6b2b5a265c75d5debe8%2FSeptember2025_WhatsNew_AIConnectors__1_.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Notion AI, like any teammates, does its best work when it has the full picture. Connect your favorite tools to Notion so context lives where work happens. That way, [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/product/enterprise-search)
 can surface answers quickly and your Agent can complete tasks with the right context. We’re continuing to add new connectors, with Notion Mail live today, and Box and Outlook Mail coming next.

**When the team at Affirm connected their tools to Notion, it clicked right away: “We replaced our stand‑alone search with Notion AI because answers belong where people work.”**

### Notion’s MCP ecosystem just got bigger

![mcp](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4nvm2r65Vy2EvJ1cN5XSkW%2Ff7e7ffa5c293e49e3b010c9cffc7641a%2Femail.png&w=3840&q=75)

Another big upgrade today: We’ve expanded our list of first-party MCP integrations with lots of new partners like Lovable, Perplexity, Mistral, and HubSpot. With Notion MCP, your tools can read context from your Notion workspace (and your connected apps) _and_ write back to Notion.

Here’s what that looks like in practice: If you’re coding in Cursor, it can pull the latest tech specs from Notion, update the codebase, then mark the task as done in Notion. The Notion ecosystem is more open than it’s ever been, and we’re just getting started.

### The best AI models, built in

![aimodels](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6RFBs5EKhcUeHOMaYeYXKM%2Fea8ecd927d635267d104346c46e36e89%2FSeptember2025_WhatsNew_AI-Models.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

AI models evolve quickly. With Notion, you don’t pay extra for every model. The latest—like Claude Sonnet 4 and GPT-5—are already built in. Just pick the model you want for your Agent, and it instantly gets to work across your workspace while respecting existing permissions.

### Notion AI will write your formulas

![formulas](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3MvbIwYDEwkRXMKLLA9fU9%2F3dddabe5c3c0f8f4633ff36dd1549ecb%2FSeptember2025_WhatsNew_AI-Formulas.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Formulas used to be their own language. Now you just describe what you want, from simple math to complex property logic, and Notion AI creates the perfect formula for you. Here’s a [quick demo](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1958590596248924549)
. Give them a try inside any database or automation!

August 19, 20252.53

[Notion 2.53: Offline mode\
-------------------------](https://www.notion.com/releases/2025-08-19)

### Work offline in Notion

We’re excited to finally say it: you can access pages, capture ideas, and keep work moving on the Notion desktop and mobile app offline. Judging by Reddit, this is _the_ feature everyone’s been waiting for. The most essential blocks work offline, with more on the way soon. [Here's a quick guide to how offline works](https://www.notion.com/help/guides/working-offline-in-notion-everything-you-need-to-know)
 →

![working offline](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/35GokFIEv2tA1MSURIysmD/be818559eb4e85bfb66958036cd969eb/WN-WorkingOfflineTooltip-V3.gif)

### Download pages for offline use

You can download any page and use it without the internet (and even create new ones). Manage them all from the new offline dashboard (`Settings` → `Offline`). Your Recents and Favorites are auto-downloaded for offline use if you’re on the Plus, Business, or Enterprise plan. We’re starting here and we’ll keep making offline in Notion even better.

![toggle](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2WGrMxO4GqDtCqh1tgBgG0%2Ff27e7c56b9cf0bd7cb227057b528d5fd%2FWN-TakePagesOffline-v7.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Notion Mail is now on iOS

We hope Notion Mail has been bringing some joy to your inbox. Now you can stay on top of your emails on the go (even offline!). [Download the Notion Mail iOS app →](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/notion-mail/id6504265936)

![mail ios](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F494ctkM0ch3SQ2CtFtLRZa%2F07bc5c43a8e95056edbbf4cdd51c357b%2FWN-MailiOS-V7__1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### **Use your favorite AI tools with Notion’s MCP**

Notion’s Model Context Protocol (MCP) server lets your AI tools securely reference, create, and update content within Notion. Just connect ChatGPT, Claude, or Cursor to turn prompts into new Notion pages, updated tasks, and more. Check out these quick demos from [ChatGPT](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1948772739843596301)
 and [Claude](https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/1944819149789700215)
, and our [technical docs](https://developers.notion.com/docs/mcp)
 to learn more!

![mcp](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2rKAj3chStVpGH51LWjDH2%2F0a3f6c57257be8e7b6d4b76896d80caa%2Fimage__1___1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Create and manage tasks right in Notion Calendar

Manage your work—tasks, milestones, even personal goals—alongside your schedule. Connect any Notion database with dates to Calendar, then create, schedule, and complete tasks in the same place you plan your time. Here’s a [quick guide](https://www.notion.com/help/use-notion-calendar-with-notion#manage-a-notion-database-in-notion-calendar)
 to get started. [Try out Notion Calendar (it's free](https://calendar.notion.so/?source=august_2025_email)
) →

![cal](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/3UkvCL4utPhDjJeSK94OOo/314f9d4f302e20ba7ae9235e7a42e27d/WN-CalendarTasks__1_.gif)

# Become a Notion Partner | Notion

Become a Notion partner.


============================

We are on a mission to make software toolmaking ubiquitous, but we can't do it alone. Become a Notion partner and grow with us.

Which partner program is the right one for you?
-----------------------------------------------

Find the partner program that works for you and enjoy the benefits of working with Notion.

Technology Partner Program

Notion works best when connected with other tools that power our work. Our technology partners make this possible by building integrations that connect workflows, drive productivity and delight our joint users.

[Become a technology partner →](https://www.notion.com/partners/technology-partner-program)

Solutions Partner Program

Help us support unique needs of Notion customers and grow your business. Solutions partners unlock new sales and services opportunities, get prioritized leads and benefit from dedicated support & resources.

[Become a solutions partner →](https://www.notion.com/partners/solutions-partner-program)

Security & Compliance Partner Program

Join dozens of Security & Compliance partners around the globe and help us ensure security and compliance for Notion Enterprise customers.

[Become a security & compliance partner →](https://www.notion.com/partners/security-compliance-partner-program)

Startup Partner Program

Offer your startup network free Notion access and resources, including 6 months free of Business with Notion AI, exclusive software discounts and get access to our Startups Champions Community.

[Become a startup partner →](https://www.notion.com/startups)

Builders Program

For creators, founders, and innovators who are building the future–on Notion. Amplify your voice in the startup ecosystem while offering your audience up to 3 free months of Notion Business with Notion AI included.

[Become a builder partner →](https://www.notion.com/builders)

Notion AI answering a query across team docs and databases

Tool sprawl hurts product velocity.
-----------------------------------

![Spot Illustration: Sprawl (Red)](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F50o9qfDCrjQ1OsFD3V3JRn%2Fa0025ebb6e1a2114d2d8bd09dfdde846%2FMetaphoric-Spots_sprawl2_red-crop.png&w=3840&q=75)

Siloed teams & information

Strategy and execution is scattered across different tools, delaying launches.

Lack of visibility

Docs, information, and updates live everywhere - leading to uninformed decisions.

Productivity drain

Teams burn hours searching, writing, and context-switching instead of building.

Ship better products faster with a connected workspace.
-------------------------------------------------------

End-to-end product development in one place

Analyze customer feedback, write PRDs, track progress, and build launch plans in one connected workspace.

![Acme Inc company wiki](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6QVBzOBpCTveiqp4atv5Hm%2Fff8d96134b3782f2c8abde5920115919%2Fimage.png&w=3840&q=75)

One home for all your tools

Connect essential apps and only see what you need. Less context-switching, more flow.

![Acme Inc company wiki](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6qOqPkWjamkgBD1Du17THV%2F2a54d7696e75d9f8a2d3836ca85ff237%2FJira-Github_Integrations.png&w=3840&q=75)

Questions & Answers
-------------------

How do I start using AI Meeting Notes in Notion?

To start, type `/meet` on any Notion page, join a meeting from your Notion Calendar, or Notion will send a gentle reminder when it automatically detects meetings. AI Meeting Notes will begin capturing your meeting and generate an organized summary as soon as the meeting’s over.

Does AI Meeting Notes work with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams?

Yes! AI Meeting Notes in Notion records system audio, so you can capture Zoom meetings, Google Meet calls, and Teams meeting—no bots or extra software required.

Can AI Meeting Notes create action items automatically?

Absolutely. Notion's AI analyzes your meeting transcript to generate summaries and action items, saving your team hours of manual work.

How fast are the summaries available after a meeting?

AI Meeting Notes generates summaries instantly after the meeting ends—no waiting. Your team can put action items to work right away.

Can I search across past meeting notes?

Yes! Every transcript, summary, decision, and action item is saved in Notion and fully searchable across your workspace using Notion AI.

Is my meeting data secure?

Yes. You control exactly who can see your meeting notes and transcripts. Plus, Notion provides built-in privacy settings and one-click consent collection before meetings start.

Why use Notion’s AI Meeting Notes instead of other meeting note apps?

Unlike standalone apps, AI Meeting Notes lives directly in your Notion workspace—meaning your notes, tasks, and projects stay seamlessly connected. No switching tools, no lost context.

What languages does AI Meeting Notes support?

AI Meeting Notes supports 16 languages including English, French, Japanese and more.

Can I use AI Meeting Notes for any type of meeting?

Yes, you can use AI Meeting Notes for any meeting! Whether it's a 1:1s, team sync, sales calls, AI will create a helpful summary based on the context to fit your needs.

What should I look out for when buying meeting notes products?

It’s a complicated market–check out our handy [buyer’s guide](https://www.notion.com/product/ai-meeting-notes/ai-meeting-software-buyers-guide)
 for a breakdown on what to look out for.

# Your connected workspace for wiki, docs & projects | Notion

Solutions Partner Tiers & Requirements.


===========================================

Pick your engagement model—Sell, Services, or both—and level up with certifications and customer impact.

[Become a partner](https://www.notion.so/profile/services)

![Affiliates Illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F34wY58keVkJmlgcnRGW1Um%2Fb060d451f4448cff583daf236b94a4b8%2Faffiliates-hero.png&w=3840&q=75)

Sell - Engagement Model
-----------------------

The Sell engagement model is designed for Sales Partners that generate revenue by selling Notion licenses and managing customer billing. Selling activities include sourcing new customers, facilitating account expansions, managing renewals, and providing account oversight.

![AI Face](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4gVdBQTymvyX4Smf0LmVKl%2F0a8d2455aab7085f196e60d4fd29cd30%2FLaptop_line_chart.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Benefits

Service - Engagement Model
--------------------------

The Service Engagement Model is designed for partners that deliver consulting, implementation, integration, or managed services to help customers adopt, optimize, and scale with Notion.
