Eligibility & benefits
----------------------

[Apply now →](https://www.notion.com/creators)

1 year of Notion plus plan + Notion AI

For creators with over 100k followers and 50k average views per post.

6 months of Notion plus plan + Notion AI

For creators with over 10k followers and 5k average views per post.

Notion Perks

Access exclusive resources tailored to every stage of your creator journey—partnership opportunities, webinars, and more to help you grow and thrive.

Creators at Notion Newsletter

Join our monthly newsletter with content tailored to creators like product updates, upcoming partnership opportunities, and creator stories.

[Subscribe →](https://notion-creators.beehiiv.com/subscribe)

Questions & answers
-------------------

Who is eligible?

You must be a non-paying Notion customer with less than **10** people on their team. See [full terms and conditions](https://notion.notion.site/Creator-Program-T-C-s-1bcefdeead0580059194dcc1701c12f3?pvs=4)
.

Why is Notion offering a discount for creators?

We've seen thousands of creators use Notion to get going on the right foot — as a wiki, for project management, document sharing, notes, and more. We want to help more creators lay a strong foundation that can grow with them from the beginning.

How do I apply to receive the discount?

Fill out this [application](https://www.notion.com/creators)
!

What is the offer worth?

Notion’s Plus Plan costs $12 per member per month paid monthly. Notion’s AI add-on costs $10 per member per month paid monthly. The creator offer is equivalent to a maximum of $2,640 for 10 workspace members.

I'm already paying for a Plus Plan and eligible for the discount. Am I still eligible?

You will be eligible once your account is on a Free plan. If you are currently on a paid Notion Plus and/or AI plan, please downgrade your subscription by going to Settings -> Billing -> Change plan. The downgrade will take affect at the end of your billing period, regardless of whether you are on a Monthly or Yearly plan. Please ensure your plan has ended and does not renew before submitting your request. Feel free to reach out once you're on the Free plan and we’ll be happy to process your complimentary upgrade to Notion Plus + Notion AI then!

Still have more questions? Message support.

---

Analytics to inform what’s next

Notion’s Enterprise Plan gives admins a suite of tools to understand how employees are engaging with content.

![Analytics](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F66ZBpYQ713SgH3dMIVz7Mn%2F5b97329c0db113f15a0567df5ed4b7f8%2Fanalytics.png&w=3840&q=75)

Security & admin controls

Keep your workspace safe with security, compliance, and auditing tools

Fine-grained admin roles

Delegate admin-level users to manage workspace membership.

Advanced permissions

Specify who can do and create what, with granular precision.

SAML single sign-on

Give employees access to Notion through your identity provider using SAML-based SSO.

SCIM user provisioning

Easily create, remove, add, update, or retrieve any user or group.

Domain management tools

Claim your domain and manage who can create workspaces using it, so you’re in control.

Notion vs. Asana
----------------

Compare project management, docs, collaboration, and AI side by side.

[Get started →](https://www.notion.com/signup)

| Features | Notion | Asana |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Project tracking | ✔ Boards, lists, timelines | ✔ Boards, lists, timelines |
| Collaborative docs | ✔ Built-in, with real-time edits | ❌ Not built-in (uses integrations) |
| Knowledge base & wiki | ✔ Centralized & searchable | ❌ Not native |
| AI capabilities | ✔ AI connectors, autofill, Q&A | ❌ Limited |
| Full customization | ✔ Build any workflow you want | ❌ More rigid structure |
| Cost efficiency | ✔ One tool, imstead of 3+ | ❌ Requires additional tools |
| Templates + community | ✔ Tens of thousands of templates | ❌ Fewer options |

-----------------------------

Dedicated success manager

Your own customer success manager to help onboard large teams and create custom workflows. Reserved for teams larger than 100 paying annually.

Advanced permissions

Extra permission controls to prevent certain employees from sharing pages externally, disable guests, and set workspace-level rules.

Custom contracting

We’ll work with you to create a custom contract and payment via PO/invoice. Reserved for enterprise accounts with over 100 users.

Unlimited version history

Access version history of any page indefinitely, not just 30 days.

SCIM API

Automate user provisioning and management. Create, remove, add, update, or retrieve any user or group.

Bulk PDF export

Export all of your content at once as PDFs. Handy for legal or compliance backups.

FAQs
----

How does Notion compare to Asana for project and task management?

Notion combines [project management](http://notion.com/product/projects)
 and knowledge management in one connected workspace. While Asana focuses solely on tasks and timelines, Notion allows you to manage projects, organize your team's knowledge, and create customized workflows—all in one place. With integrated AI, you can automate tasks, find answers quickly, and keep information up to date.

Why is Notion the best Asana alternative?

Notion combines the best parts of Asana—like task tracking and timelines—with tools Asana doesn’t offer: wikis, collaborative docs, and AI-powered search. Instead of needing three different tools, you get one connected workspace.

Can Notion do everything Asana does for tracking tasks and projects?

Yes! Notion offers all the essential features for tracking tasks and projects, including boards, calendars, timelines, and due dates. However, it also provides advanced customization, so you can create workflows that adapt to your team’s unique needs. Unlike Asana, you can also integrate documentation and context directly into your project views.

Does Notion integrate with the tools my team already uses?

Absolutely. Notion integrates seamlessly with tools like Slack, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Teams. You can also embed files, sync calendars, and use our API for custom integrations. Notion often eliminates the need for additional tools like Google Docs or Confluence by centralizing your workflows and knowledge.

How does Notion’s AI help with project management?

Notion’s AI goes beyond simple automation by helping you:

*   Find answers fast: Search across tasks, documents, and databases.
    
*   Write smarter: Generate updates, meeting notes, or project summaries instantly.
    
*   Keep information up to date: Use AI to refine and organize your team’s knowledge effortlessly
    

Still comparing Notion and Asana?

FAQs
----

How does Notion compare to Fireflies for meeting notes?

Notion provides transcriptions, [AI-driven summaries](https://www.notion.com/product/ai-meeting-notes)
, and direct integration into [tasks & projects](https://www.notion.com/product/projects)
, docs, and knowledge bases. Fireflies focuses on capturing notes but lacks deeper workspace connections.

Is Notion a good alternative to Fireflies?

If you're looking for more than just transcription and basic integrations, absolutely. Notion gives you meeting notes plus a complete workspace for docs, tasks, wikis, and databases. Many teams tell us they love having everything connected instead of scattered across different apps.

Is Notion more cost-efficient than Fireflies?

Yes. Notion’s [Business plan](https://www.notion.com/pricing)
 includes AI notes plus unlimited pages, tasks, wikis, and more—often at or below what you’d pay for Fireflies’s single-purpose subscription.

Can Notion handle enterprise compliance and security?

[Notion meets strict enterprise standards](https://www.notion.com/enterprise)
, with advanced permissions, data residency options, and best-in-class privacy controls. Fireflies is a standalone bot; deploying across large enterprises means managing another vendor & data flow.

Why should teams switch from Fireflies to Notion?

Notion centralizes meeting notes, tasks, knowledge, and workflows in one place. This eliminates data silos, saves money, and boosts productivity through AI-driven automations. Fireflies requires manual work to move insights from meetings into actionable tasks and projects.

Transform meetings into action with Notion


==============================================

# How we’re killing software sprawl (by using our own product)

[All posts←](https://www.notion.com/blog)

[←All posts](https://www.notion.com/blog)

Published June 10, 2025 in [For Teams](https://www.notion.com/blog/topic/for-teams)

How we’re killing software sprawl (by using our own product)
============================================================

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FjgyiijyOvAvAYMgr3oGZQ%2Fec1ffb63bab78db11972d12be2aded3b%2FT024JLF7A-U048QBE7T36-e5e74eb80885-512.png&w=96&q=80)

By Drew Evans

Marketing

![killing-software-sprawl-hero](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3RHwStDjGLilnRxXASnDKi%2F38004059cf3e953533765ae73213449b%2Fkilling-software-sprawl-hero.png&w=3840&q=75)

4 min read

Share this post

*   [](http://twitter.com/share?text=How%20we%E2%80%99re%20killing%20software%20sprawl%20(by%20using%20our%20own%20product)&url=https://www.notion.com/blog/how-were-killing-software-sprawl-by-using-our-own-product)
    
*   [](https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=https://www.notion.com/blog/how-were-killing-software-sprawl-by-using-our-own-product)
    
*   [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://www.notion.com/blog/how-were-killing-software-sprawl-by-using-our-own-product&t=How%20we%E2%80%99re%20killing%20software%20sprawl%20(by%20using%20our%20own%20product))
    
*   [](https://www.notion.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#)
    

Modern teams have a problem.

They’ve spent years accumulating more software tools than ever before—[the average company uses 112 (!) apps](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1233538/average-number-saas-apps-yearly/)
—yet work feels more fragmented than it did even just a few years ago. Teams jump between tools searching for documents, lose productivity flow context-switching between apps, and duplicate efforts because everything lives somewhere else.

Bottom line is, the tools we thought would make our lives easier just create more friction.

And by no means are we immune to the sprawl virus at Notion. We live it daily, but we’ve started to use our own platform to solve it from within. This isn’t just about building better products—it’s about fundamentally rethinking how work should flow.

Solving our own software sprawl
-------------------------------

To ease our own pain, we started to think about subtracting rather than adding tools, and quickly found that we could consolidate nearly all of our workflows in Notion.

Here’s a look at what we built to keep our tech stack in check:

*   **Enterprise search:** Our main tool stack consists of tools like Notion, Slack, Github, and Google Slides, but important information can be lost to the depths of each. Luckily, Notion AI can dig across all those tools with Enterprise Search—without it, we’d likely be looking at a standalone search app like Glean. Instead of maintaining (and paying for) separate search tools, our teams can find information across all connected apps—plus our Notion workspace—in one place.
    
*   **Meeting notes:** Over the last year, we’d tested just about every note-taking tool out there, from [Otter.ai](http://otter.ai/)
     and Granola to Zoom and Google Meet. The biggest challenge is that they’re all disconnected from the tools where our work actually happens. With AI Meeting Notes in Notion, our meetings are recorded (with consent!), transcribed, and summarized in a Notion doc. Now, our conversations are more actionable across the company—and searchable by Notion AI—because they live beside our projects, tasks, and other docs.
    
*   **Knowledge management:** No surprise, but our documentation happens entirely in Notion. Lots of teams have a scattered mess of docs across tools like Google Docs, Confluence, and other individual team wikis. But keeping everything in Notion means our company documentation exists alongside the work it describes, making it easier to find, use, and keep fresh.
    
*   **Project management:** Notion has always been a place to track to-do lists and simple projects. But our teams have complex workflows—EPD, for example, uses GitHub for issues and Figma for design specs, to name a couple. Problem is, paying for seats in every tool for every person adds up. So we built the integrations that connect those tools to Notion so we can avoid the extra cost but keep the context. Now, GitHub issue statuses are automatically updated and Figma design previews are visible in Notion—for everyone.
    
*   **Forms:** We run a lot of surveys, everything from customer feedback surveys to figuring out what snacks we want in our offices. But when using a tool like Typeform, we’d always wind up exporting the data and importing it into Notion for analysis. [Now with forms built directly into Notion](https://www.notion.com/product/forms)
    , responses automatically populate databases where we can analyze trends (thanks charts!) and assign follow-up tasks. No more paying for a separate tool to collect information that ultimately winds up in Notion anyway.
    
*   **Email management:** Like most teams, we live in Slack and Gmail for communication. But trying to wrangle the constant chaos of an inbox feels like trying to tame Godzilla. Email tools like Superhuman help with speed, but they don’t solve the core problem—your inbox mixes urgent work messages with newsletters and spam in one chronological mess. Notion Mail, on the other hand, uses Notion AI to automatically sort and label emails based on what actually matters. And with a direct integration with Notion Calendar, scheduling meetings is a breeze.
    

Working in the macro and the micro
----------------------------------

It’s great to replace tools company-wide. But over time, these features have allowed our individual teams to scrap redundant tools too.

For example, when we transitioned our Customer Experience team’s knowledge management from Zendesk into Notion, we were rethinking the team’s entire workflow. Doing so saw some impressive improvements: A **73 percent increase in knowledge base engagement**, and a **19 percent improvement in team satisfaction**. More importantly, we eliminated the cognitive overhead of maintaining multiple systems in parallel.

Consolidation works best when it feels organic rather than forced. Whatever your new tool, it needs to adapt to how your teams _actually_ work, not require them to adjust to rigid tool constraints and processes.

The true cost of fragmentation
------------------------------

For our teams, killing our software sprawl has shown immediate and tangible results. Teams spend less time hunting for information and more time actually using it. Context-switching between apps has virtually disappeared. Most importantly, our work feels more connected—decisions, discussions, and documentation all live in the same ecosystem where they can inform each other.

**That’s why** **we’re reimagining what’s possible when our tools truly understand how we work**. The future belongs to organizations that can move fluidly between different types of thinking—creative, analytical, strategic—without those invisible barriers getting in the way.

FAQs
----

How does Notion compare to Otter for meeting notes?

Notion provides transcriptions, [AI-driven summaries](https://www.notion.com/product/ai-meeting-notes)
, and direct integration into [tasks & projects](https://www.notion.com/product/projects)
, docs, and knowledge bases. Otter focuses on capturing notes but lacks deeper workspace connections.

Is Notion a good alternative to Otter?

If you're looking for more than just transcription and basic integrations, absolutely. Notion gives you meeting notes plus a complete workspace for docs, tasks, wikis, and databases. Many teams tell us they love having everything connected instead of scattered across different apps.

Is Notion more cost-efficient than Otter?

Yes. Notion’s [Business plan](https://www.notion.com/pricing)
 includes AI notes plus unlimited pages, tasks, wikis, and more—often at or below what you’d pay for Otter’s single-purpose subscription.

Can Notion handle enterprise compliance and security?

[Notion meets strict enterprise standards](https://www.notion.com/enterprise)
, with advanced permissions, data residency options, and best-in-class privacy controls. Otter adds another vendor and data flow to secure when rolling out company‑wide.

Why should teams switch from Otter to Notion?

Notion centralizes meeting notes, tasks, knowledge, and workflows in one place. This eliminates data silos, saves money, and boosts productivity through AI-driven automations.

Transform meetings into action with Notion


==============================================

# February 4, 2026 – Search your Asana tasks and projects from Notion

![Asana AI Connector](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4GT4xTvZRXbvXRIWCL3c5C%2F955b0c821ed5189b1a9d7a0bc88c76aa%2FAsana_AI_Connector__1_.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Use it to check status, spot what needs attention, and see what’s coming up next, all without leaving Notion. Everything respects your existing Asana permissions.

# Tu espacio de trabajo conectado para wikis, documentos y proyectos | Notion

Agentes que trabajan mientras duermes.
--------------------------------------

Automatiza tareas repetitivas

![Wiki de la empresa Acme S. A.](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F66uWzl3rjkRkaR5rZVXVRm%2Fa0e2a91301cc2b00a1c2970f287f5819%2Fagents-1.png&w=3840&q=75)

Optimiza flujos de trabajo específicos

![Wiki de la empresa Acme S. A.](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5ptw03mrKKXZlEUdBz8oxt%2F6c5ba63c6ecdd89ac0b7a6454ad9aaaa%2Fagents-2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Crea y compártelos en tu espacio de trabajo

![Wiki de la empresa Acme S. A.](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F60WzxrnbNvmxo5WpDZKaaa%2F104f404deddbca38e69e5a94ae4fa61b%2Fagents-a.png&w=3840&q=75)

Preguntas frecuentes
--------------------

¿Cuándo se lanzarán los agentes personalizados?

Nos hace ilusión poder ofrecerte pronto los agentes personalizados en Notion. Ahora mismo estamos en fase alfa y afinamos la experiencia a partir de los comentarios de quienes ya los usan. Te avisaremos en cuanto estén disponibles para más usuarios.

¿Cuándo recibiré una respuesta?

¡Gracias por tu interés! Revisaremos todas las solicitudes y nos pondremos en contacto contigo a medida que ampliemos el acceso a los agentes personalizados. Mientras tanto, puedes empezar a utilizar el agente de Notion hoy mismo. Ya está disponible en los planes Business y Enterprise y gestiona muchos de los mismos flujos de trabajo. Los usuarios de los planes Free y Plus podrán probarlo.

Prueba a pedirle al agente de Notion que te ayude con [la incorporación de nuevos empleados](http://dev.notion.so/?target=agent.business.website)
, o [que te muestre lo que puede hacer](http://dev.notion.so/?target=agent.personal.website)
.

Estoy entusiasmado con los agentes personalizados. ¿Cuál es el siguiente paso?

¡Genial! Esto es lo que puedes hacer:

*   **Empieza hoy mismo con el agente de Notion**: ya disponible en los planes Business y Enterprise, el agente de Notion puede gestionar muchos flujos de trabajo potentes, como recopilar comentarios, generar informes y crear bases de datos. La principal diferencia es que tú lo activas cada vez, en lugar de que se ejecute automáticamente.
    
*   **Explora casos de uso**: echa un vistazo a nuestra [biblioteca de casos de uso](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases)
     para ver todo lo que se puede hacer con la IA de Notion
    
*   **Sigue de cerca las novedades**: te avisaremos en cuanto los agentes personalizados estén disponibles.
    

¿En qué se diferencian los agentes personalizados del agente de Notion situado en la esquina inferior derecha?

**El agente de Notion** es tu asistente personal de IA, ya disponible. Realiza tareas complejas de varios pasos a partir de una sola indicación, como crear bases de datos, analizar datos y generar informes. Puedes trabajar con él a través del chat siempre que lo necesites.

**Los agentes personalizados** (próximamente) pueden ejecutarse automáticamente según programaciones o disparadores, pueden compartirse con todo tu equipo y tienen permisos más detallados.

La buena noticia: la mayoría de los flujos de trabajo que imaginas para los agentes personalizados se pueden llevar a cabo hoy mismo con el agente de Notion; solo tendrás que activarlo cada vez en lugar de que se ejecute automáticamente.

---

Custom

Questions & answers
-------------------

How does Notion AI use my data?

We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://notion.so/security)
 to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.

Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices)
.

Where can I find my invoices?

Workspace admins can access, view, and download your workspace's invoices by going to `Settings & members` → `Billing`, then scrolling to `Invoices`. There you can click on "View invoice" to see the invoice PDF.

What are your accepted payment methods?

We currently accept all major credit and debit card brands.

What is a block?

A block is any single piece of content you add to your page, like a paragraph of text, a to-do item, an image, a code block, an embedded file, etc. Think of your page as being made up of these building blocks. Learn more about blocks [here →](https://www.notion.com/help/what-is-a-block)

What happens when I go over the block storage limit on a Free Plan?

If you’re using a Free Plan workspace by yourself, you’ll be able to add as many pages and blocks as you like.

If you’re using a Free Plan workspace with multiple members, you’ll be able to add a limited number of blocks before you have to upgrade.

When you reach the limit, you can still read, edit, and organize existing content blocks as usual, but you won’t be able to add new content blocks.

Do you offer student discounts?

The Plus Plan (with a 1-member limit) is free for students and educators. Compared to the Free Plan, you’ll be able to add more guests, have access to more version history, and upload larger files.

Just sign up with your school email address and you’ll immediately gain access to these features. Thousands of school email domains are eligible, not just .edu!

For more info & FAQs, [visit the Notion for Education page](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-for-education)
.

What do the different analytics tiers mean?

**Basic page analytics (Free and Plus Plans):** Includes a list of page viewers as well as a chart displaying views over time.

**Advanced page analytics** **(Business Plan):** Includes everything above as well as a list of page editors.

**Workspace analytics (Enterprise Plan):** Includes everything above as well as user level analytics, analytics on all pages in your workspace, and search analytics for content in your workspace.

How is pricing calculated for the paid plans?

If you upgrade your workspace to one of the paid plans, you will be charged a fee per member.

Guests are free of charge – but they can only access individual pages they are invited to. In other words, guests won’t be able to see all the team pages under the `Teamspaces` section in the left sidebar.

How do I get charged when I add members to my workspace?

When you add a new member to your workspace, they will use an existing paid seat if you have any available in your workspace. If you do not have any existing available paid seats, your count of paid seats will increase by 1. Changes in membership that occur mid-month will create prorated charges based on the amount of time remaining in the billing cycle when the paid seat was added.

For every member you delete from your workspace, you will open up 1 available paid seat. This means you have the option to exchange members in your workspace without paying any additional costs, as long as your total billable seat count remains the same.

You’ll receive an invoice for any charges accrued by changes in membership on your selected payment method, on the day of the month you initially signed up for your subscription.

Each time your billing period starts (monthly or annual), your count of paid seats will be synchronized so it exactly matches the amount of members present in your workspace.

How does adding and removing members work?

Whether you're on a monthly or yearly billing schedule, your account may be charged on a monthly basis if you make changes in membership. If you added members, your account will be charged a prorated amount based on the percentage of the billing cycle left when a user was added. If you removed members, you will not receive credit but instead will still have use of that seat for a different user for the remainder of the billing period.

How are paid seats counted?

A paid seat can be thought of as a license for one member to use your Notion workspace. Workspace owners can view the total paid seat count for their workspace by going to `Settings & members` > `Billing`. Once you have added a paid seat, you will keep it for the duration of your billing period.

When your billing cycle renews, either monthly or annually, you will be charged for your plan amount multiplied by the number of members in your workspace, plus any prorated charges for new paid seats added in the past month. Your number of paid seats will be recalculated at each renewal to match the number of members present in the workspace.

What happens when I change plans?

*   **Upgrading your plan:** Your account will be upgraded and charged immediately. The amount due will be reduced based on the percentage of the billing cycle left at the time the plan was changed.
    
*   **Downgrading your plan:** Your account will be downgraded at the end of your billing cycle. Learn about how your features may be impacted after a downgrade [here →](https://notion.com/help/plan-downgrade)
    

How do I cancel my paid plan?

Your Notion subscription, annual or monthly, will automatically renew until you cancel it. You can cancel your subscription by going to `Settings` in the left-hand sidebar on a desktop computer, then selecting `Billing`, then `Change plan`. After you cancel, you’ll still have access to all the paid features until the end of your billing cycle.

Learn more about billing in [this article](https://www.notion.com/help/billing)
.

What happens if my payment fails? Like if my credit card expires?

Your account email will be notified after each failed payment. Payments may be retried up to 8 times within the next month.

After this, if the payment did not succeed, your workspace will get restricted to limited-access for a period of time before being downgraded to the Free plan.

Can I change my payment method?

You can change your payment method at any time in your billing settings.

How do refunds work?

Our refund policy is simple. If you believe you've made a mistake signing up for a paid Notion subscription online or in-app, please contact us inside the app or email [\[email protected\]](https://www.notion.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#ee9a8b8f83ae838f858b80819a878180c08d8183)
. We'll be happy to refund you the full amount (not pro-rated) if you downgrade your subscription within three days of signing up for monthly billing, or within 30 days of signing up for annual billing.

If you have accidentally added members to your workspace, you can remove those members at any time. If you’ve been charged for members who were accidentally added, we're happy to provide a refund of the prorated charges if you reach out within three days of the invoice date (please make sure the additional members have been removed from your workspace when writing in).

And if for any reason you're unhappy with Notion, please let us know at [\[email protected\]](https://www.notion.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#05716064684568646e606b6a716c6a6b2b666a68)
 — we'd love to hear your feedback, and will be happy to work with you to create the best experience possible.

What if I live in a region with a mandatory refund policy?

If you live in the European Union, United Kingdom, or another region with a mandatory refund policy, you may be eligible for a monthly subscription refund past 72 hours. For example, customers in the European Union can receive a full refund for a monthly subscription within 14 days of purchase, rather than 72 hours.

To request a refund, please contact us inside the app or email [\[email protected\]](https://www.notion.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#463223272b062b272d232829322f29286825292b)
. If you live in a region with a mandatory refund policy, please let us know and we'll be happy to assist you.

---

# January 20, 2026 – Notion 3.2: Mobile AI, new models, people directory

First round of 2026 updates is in! This release helps Notion fit into your world even better. Work on the go, choose your AI models, track what matters to your team.

### AI Notes on mobile

![AI Notes on mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/6XZZh0mf2GEhfeMUJoHVO8/5fcfdbb169778f44b9983f12c0158164/AI-MeetingNotes-V3.gif)

Whether you’re joining a call while commuting, brainstorming on your morning walk, or meeting without laptops, everything just works on mobile the way you’d hope. One tap starts AI note transcriptions (even when you switch apps or lock your screen) and summarizes everything into clear summaries, action items, and shareable docs in seconds.

### **Your Agent fits in your pocket**

![Your Agent fits in your pocket](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4pUcFp2Ym0ftJU1mYUuj1O%2Ff0255b3da90f02bb3d34d31eba2d1b0c%2F01_AI_better_on_mobile.png&w=3840&q=75)

Everything your Notion Agent can do on desktop, it now does on your phone. Build forms, create databases, search your company’s brain. Think of an item on your to-do list, hand it off to your agent, and it will work in the background while you move onto your next task. No more waiting. Here’s a [live demo](https://x.com/akothari/status/2007140306677055931?s=20)
 of what Notion Agent can do.

### New models, same memory

![New models, same memory](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4xUt6BfR1pTAgQbrlggzn3%2F7e4ea008eb7453a6f1adc833dc67e971%2FAI_Models.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

When a new model drops, it’s ready in Notion. You can now pick from GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, or Gemini 3. Or let **Auto** select the best model for the job. Switch between them freely while your context stays with you. Models will continue to change, but your memory in Notion doesn’t.

### Understand how your team uses Notion AI

![Understand how your team uses Notion AI ](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3MSFoTAKJO1Xo3UxbxQ7kE%2F8a700f1e6e18985536867518fe50483c%2FAI_analytics.png&w=3840&q=75)

Understand how your team uses Notion AI

Enterprise admins now have clear visibility into AI usage over time. See who’s using it most, which features drive engagement, and where AI delivers value. Go to **Settings** → **Analytics** → **AI** to access. More insights coming soon.

### **People Directory**

![People Directory ](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7MnFOiiWDhG1Qo0Ya9evSk%2Ff458e573bd0f2d5a2d405009bd2d62e4%2FPeople_Directory.png&w=3840&q=75)

People Directory

The new People Directory shows everyone in your workspace. It’s a pre-built database you can customize or import from HR systems ([learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/people-directory)
). Check it out by searching for “People” or go to **Settings** → **Members** → **View People Directory** (it’s on the top right).

### Do more with Notion & Jira

![Do more with Notion & Jira](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3GwRh2toJNqELMkofYwzhT%2F82fe0c7d1b31a27c5a3663da5f5c0e26%2F06_Notion_and_Jira.png&w=3840&q=75)

The improved Jira integration is for teams where engineers live in Jira, but everyone else plans in Notion. Sync development work from Jira, then add your own Notion properties right alongside it—quarterly goals, customer feedback, revenue impact. Build dashboards that combine both, so you see the full picture. On Enterprise, edit key Jira fields directly from Notion and sync changes back automatically.

### Multi-account on Notion Mail

![Multi-account on Notion Mail](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2H3lLe9ukWIcd9OU99eQXx%2F63c27bb8c1cb054e69a5da4692bf0d6d%2FMulti_Account_Mail.png&w=3840&q=75)

Manage multiple email addresses under one Notion account. Switch between personal and work inboxes easily. A lot of you have been waiting for this one, so thank you for your patience. We hope you [give Notion Mail try](https://www.notion.com/help/get-started-with-notion-mail#download-notion-mail)
!

### **More improvements**

*   **Big desktop performance improvements:** Pages on Windows open 27% faster, Mac desktop is up +11%. [This chart](https://x.com/ivanhzhao/status/2001834160198197305?s=20)
     is one of our most meaningful from 2025. It shows pages now load in ⅓ less time. And we’ll keep improving!
    
*   **Hide Calendar panel**: You can hide the context panel now for a full view of your calendar ([see the demo](https://x.com/NotionCalendar/status/1995939070154080553?s=20)
    ).
    
*   **Mail to Notion pages:** Save emails directly to Notion pages for project documentation and reference.
    
*   **In-page find knows diacritics**: Searching on a page for words with accents like “café” or “naïve” now works exactly how you’'d expect.
    
*   **Confetti effect in automations**: Add a little celebration for your automations — like [this](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthiasfrankprofile_so-i-guess-this-just-happened-notion-activity-7407336436582068224-Yzh3?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAASwbfgBDD6e1rYFMC4ggWjFn4pUkVaN0Vw)
    !
    
*   **Notion MCP improvements for Enterprise:** Track MCP activity in audit logs and query multiple databases. Soon, you’ll also be able to control which external AI tools can connect to your workspace.
    

P.S. Last year brought Agents, AI notes, enterprise search, offline mode, database permissions, and 90+ features. Here’s a database with [everything released in 2025](https://notion.notion.site/2025)
.

Recent releases
---------------

[All releases→](https://www.notion.com/releases)

 [](https://www.notion.com/releases/2026-02-09)

# Toyota uses Notion to drive more efficient workflows with collaboration that comes standard

![Toyota](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4DTHhD68iDUWCgAEuWTqjy%2F7d9aa80ffe519986fd86ef4690e08f4f%2FToyota_Logo.png&w=1080&q=75)

Toyota uses Notion to drive more efficient workflows with collaboration that comes standard
===========================================================================================

Toyota’s Frontier Research Center is at the forefront of the future for the largest brand in one of the world’s largest industries. Their team is responsible for not only conducting a wide range of research but also sharing findings with the world. Since switching to Notion to consolidate and centrally manage all of this work, they're more efficient and productive than ever before.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2NmWvjKhiyzNu2Y5R0yEZF%2F5563b9812b920c72d18fcdda404586a2%2FUntitled.png&w=96&q=80)

Taku Wakasugi

Toyota Frontier Research Center

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6Pg8OxJbKF3LnwhZFOk0Yy%2F2f07d9ccca5a49b7408d34a4e3aaa054%2FToyota_Buma.png&w=96&q=80)

Kumiko Buma

Toyota Frontier Research Center

Use cases

Project Management, Knowledge Base

1

Streamlined workflows in Notion reduce approval timelines by 3x
---------------------------------------------------------------

For the researchers at Toyota, sharing findings with the public is just as important as conducting the research itself. To do this, the research center promotes their work on social media for the world to engage with. But doing so requires a rigorous approval process to ensure accuracy and maintain the integrity of the Toyota brand. Before switching to Notion, this process was a tedious back-and-forth exchange of messages between various teams that was painfully inefficient.

With Notion, every post gets drafted and sent for approval in an easy-to-follow workflow that ends with a single click of the “approve” button that reduced approval timelines by 3x. Instead of the back and forth messages, the team can quickly check statuses and receive automated notifications of changes and updates.

![Rock](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5rNyz2rvZwCw1R2Rnb6fBr%2F4695c5eaa26cb4ba3f6d165827421f22%2FRock.png&w=1080&q=75)

The previously complex approval process for posts can now be completed with just the click of a button.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Not only do our streamlined workflows in Notion save us time, they also make it easier to stay up to date on task details and progress. This means our social media posts are more accurate, and we can publish them faster than before.

![Taku Wakasugi](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2NmWvjKhiyzNu2Y5R0yEZF%2F5563b9812b920c72d18fcdda404586a2%2FUntitled.png&w=1080&q=75)

Taku Wakasugi  
Toyota Frontier Research Center

2

Instant access to a single source of truth boosted efficiency and collaboration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In addition to workflows, Toyota also keeps more dynamic information like research schedules and budgets in Notion. What used to be captured in multiple versions of a spreadsheet with a single owner is now in a shared Notion database. Now, instead of struggling to figure out which spreadsheet is reliable and up-to-date, everyone at Toyota can turn to the same Notion database as their single source of truth.

Plus, with automations and notifications, the right people get updates when a status property has been changed. And seeing that same database in a timeline view gives everyone a cohesive overview of what’s going on across the organization and when.

![Toyota Section 2](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F43eGelSWkfxyE7eaggDAje%2Fdcca86ef2ceaebbcce8637bbb3f07104%2FNotionToyota2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Toyota’s research schedule gives everyone at the company a clear overview of what research is going on when in one comprehensive dashboard.

3

Consolidate information so you don’t need to look anywhere else
---------------------------------------------------------------

The group conducting R&D on humanoid robots struggled to efficiently use their meeting minutes and background information because they were stored in different places.

By using Notion, they could centrally manage all this information in a single database, including morning meeting minutes, tasks, and research knowledge. This made daily morning meetings more efficient, as members could consolidate information on the meeting minutes page. Progress management also became easier by categorizing tasks as issues, defects, bugs, and other useful titles. Research knowledge can now be stored in the database with one click using Web Clipper. Consolidating all this information in Notion means group members don't need to look anywhere else.

![consolidate](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3ETzkzvCYFsOd73P4sg45b%2F365466c3aed9875e5567c84f517b0fd5%2FConsolidateInNotion.png&w=1080&q=75)

Each of Toyota’s teamspaces streamlines access to information, creating a dedicated area for every team to keep their notes, projects, and knowledge, all customized to suit their unique ways of working.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

We can’t just rely on our memory. Notion let’s us document and access the latest important information easily, which puts us all at ease and made catching up after returning from my maternity leave seamless.

![Kumiko Buma](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6Pg8OxJbKF3LnwhZFOk0Yy%2F2f07d9ccca5a49b7408d34a4e3aaa054%2FToyota_Buma.png&w=2048&q=75)

Kumiko Buma  
Toyota Frontier Research Center

4

Notion’s customizations and versatility now fuels a culture of documentation
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

What many at Toyota have enjoyed most about Notion is the ability to express any type of information with different types of standardized content blocks. Whether it’s text, an image, or a table, customizing pages allows Notion to be used for a wide variety of use cases at the company. This not only cuts the time it takes to create a doc in half but also makes the work feel more enjoyable.

Making the work easier and more enjoyable ultimately results in a more robust culture of documentation at the company that benefits everyone and drives their research forward faster than ever before.

![NotionToyota4](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F56UpM6Se2PsujREiY1FXzo%2F13e984e1c79c7286e86d22e0cadc7238%2FNotionToyota4.png&w=3840&q=75)

Toyota transformed simple meeting notes with action items, timelines, and visualizations all organized in a database so everyone’s informed and prepared.

Put your team’s work into high gear like Toyota
-----------------------------------------------

Notion is free to try on a wide range of devices. Request a demo below to get Notion for your team.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# How Qonto keeps nearly 1,600 employees moving in perfect sync

![Qonto](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4gkKQDkIwcQR2uBy3F7JwS%2Fdb763e78328371149e65b3a3610c58de%2FQonto_logo.png&w=3840&q=75)

How Qonto keeps nearly 1,600 employees moving in perfect sync
=============================================================

As European fintech Qonto expanded across eight markets and 600,000 customers, it needed a digital workspace that could deliver on its own core customer value: saving time. With Notion, Qonto now streamlines product development, enhances cross-functional collaboration, and maximizes productivity through a single source of truth for work and knowledge.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6vXoNgGyMLgePCYt9jdGHe%2Fe24705de1867c795cf5c4eef6a2fc36b%2Fimage-2.png&w=96&q=80)

Jean-Philippe Denis

Tech Operations Principal

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2mg2iwrY7Rnh5V7ETgXi1Z%2F471d9604358c5215efc5bf3a777f4d62%2Fimage.png&w=96&q=80)

Diane Ndeke

Knowledge Manager

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6T7VKRs0gJjOHjHMp4oatd%2Fa2fc7b25267b50c279d7ee962d9bcb0c%2Fimage-3.png&w=96&q=80)

Tristan Dupont

Senior Lean Expert

Use cases

Company-wide use, Knowledge Base, Product Management, Wiki

![](https://www.notion.com/customers/qonto)

Play

Uh-oh! It looks like your ad blocker is preventing the video from playing.

Please watch it on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sceIwry-s-Q)

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FcatLookingUp.png&w=384&q=75)

1

Scaling from sticky notes to a connected digital workspace
----------------------------------------------------------

Qonto has always been driven by a mission to revolutionize business finance management. The company’s nearly 1,600 employees embrace Lean working principles to analyze their work, identify inefficiencies, and solve problems at their source. As Qonto grew, its system of walls covered in post-it notes was not able to scale with them. Today, the company uses Notion as its central operating system—helping teams stay aligned, document decisions, and build processes that evolve as fast as the business does. The result is a highly-efficient team delivering maximum value with exceptional quality.

![Post-it Illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FaFzOEOD3xueO4CMbYNJVW%2F73e45a9211eed5391023caa61cc7b72f%2Fpost-its.png&w=1080&q=75)

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4bHBhydnj7OxDGSmLy9pbD%2F44a9774ae87e202bab2901a7fa3e6b91%2FFrame_2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Qonto creates working Kanbans similar to this one in Notion databases, keeping teams organized and work transparent.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Notion’s flexibility lets us build a system that supports our Lean principles and keep the entire company aligned. It’s the first tool people open every morning.

![Tristan Dupont](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6T7VKRs0gJjOHjHMp4oatd%2Fa2fc7b25267b50c279d7ee962d9bcb0c%2Fimage-3.png&w=1080&q=75)

Tristan Dupont  
Senior Lean Expert

2

Eliminating silos by centralizing product development
-----------------------------------------------------

Qonto's initial informal approach to product planning supported strong agility and innovation. As the company scaled, maintaining alignment across growing teams became essential to continue shipping quality at speed. By centralizing its product development process in Notion, everyone now operates from a single source of truth—with company OKRs and individual tasks connected seamlessly to databases and automations. This streamlined approach helps everyone work better together:

*   **A single roadmap keeps everyone aligned**. A timeline view of the product roadmap gives everyone visibility into ongoing work. The product marketing and ops teams use the same Notion database to create their working Kanbans, optimizing cross-team coordination.
    
*   **Automated progress tracking keeps everyone informed.** Qonto uses automations and formulas to track whether tasks are on pace, falling behind, or need attention. Teams get automatic notifications when statuses change, so everyone stays up-to-date without needing to chase down product managers for updates.
    
*   **Customized workflows power smooth collaboration.** Qonto connects individual team workflows—from value analysis to operations—back to the product roadmap using Notion’s linked databases. Teams can customize their own Kanban boards to match how they plan and prioritize work, giving them flexibility while improving visibility across the company.
    

![Map illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1cSya62UZ3XyJXLRPSfKmu%2Fb2fa03528d2b882a7a79d3f219c9e6a1%2Fmap.png&w=1080&q=75)

![](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/6G1LodukqvEiqDXgbZzgP9/a97c0096ce8ebd7125ca594065d45a79/Qonto-Product-Roadmap_2_cropped.gif)

Qonto has centralized product development in a Notion database like this, delivering real-time visibility into ongoing work across teams.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

With Notion, we identify potential issues instantly. We can track progress in real-time and resolve problems before they escalate.

![Jean-Philippe Denis](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6vXoNgGyMLgePCYt9jdGHe%2Fe24705de1867c795cf5c4eef6a2fc36b%2Fimage-2.png&w=1080&q=75)

Jean-Philippe Denis  
Tech Operations Principal

3

A single source of truth to unify knowledge and work
----------------------------------------------------

Everyone at Qonto, from interns to the C-suite, uses Notion as their knowledge hub—preventing information silos and enabling faster decision-making. Page verification ensures information stays relevant, and commonly-used templates keep processes and documentation consistent across the company.

Qonto organises work and knowledge in Notion through a three-layer architecture that keeps information accessible and current:

*   **A company wiki centralizes documentation.** Qonto maintains a comprehensive company wiki as its source of truth, housing essential documentation like policies, values, and ways of working in an organized, central database.
    
*   **Teamspaces enable focused collaboration.** Department-specific teamspaces display missions, objectives, and Kanban boards for task management, making it easy for teams to track progress and manage their work effectively.
    
*   **Individual pages to stay organised.** Within teamspaces, each team member has a dedicated subpage to manage personal workflows and tasks, ensuring clear accountability and organization.
    

![File Organization Illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3Jd6nMA4tH0VCndhMsGGl8%2F7c836bd7dfb911598b152767cadf5f42%2FIllustration_for_Customer_story.png&w=1080&q=75)

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3Lzm0saD8SrwBNfr6Fh541%2F437a8571bc3bcd441420bcff4ffb8d26%2FFrame_6__1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

Qonto maintains a comprehensive company wiki like this one as its source of truth, housing essential documentation in an organized, central database.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

From product development to knowledge sharing, Notion has created a level of transparency and collaboration that would be impossible with traditional tools.

![Diane Ndeke](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2mg2iwrY7Rnh5V7ETgXi1Z%2F471d9604358c5215efc5bf3a777f4d62%2Fimage.png&w=1920&q=75)

Diane Ndeke  
Knowledge Manager

4

Maintaining company-wide alignment through seamless collaboration
-----------------------------------------------------------------

Notion has become more than just a tool at Qonto—it’s deeply embedded into how the entire company operates. This widespread adoption across the organization has delivered several key benefits:

*   **Minimizing manual and duplicative work.** By integrating other apps used for daily work with Notion—like FigJam, Whimsical, and Slack—Qonto improves transparency and efficiency by centralizing work in one place.
    
*   **Maintaining company-wide alignment.** From Kanban boards to advanced database formulas, teams can work their own way while staying connected through a single source of truth. Notion’s intuitive interface makes it easy for everyone to use, further strengthening cross-functional collaboration.
    
*   **Fewer missed deadlines.** Automated workflows reduce overhead and eliminate the cognitive load of tracking deadlines and coordinating tasks. Teams can instead channel their energy into more impactful work, leading to better business outcomes and higher employee satisfaction.
    

As Qonto has scaled, Notion has evolved with them—even becoming an unexpected competitive advantage in hiring by showcasing the company’s commitment to efficient, modern ways of working. Qonto’s deep engagement with the product, including early testing of new features, has allowed it to push the boundaries of what’s possible with Notion and created a valuable feedback loop that drives innovation at both companies.

![Illustration for Customer story](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1kLkhfyQdE9LM86B5AZDom%2F8e4d4b586feec4bf51e2ae8681288ae1%2FIllustration_for_Customer_story.png&w=1080&q=75)

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-rectangle.png)

Notion isn't just another tool—it's the backbone of how we operate. As we've grown, Notion has evolved with us, enabling us to maintain efficiency and alignment at scale.

![Jean-Philippe Denis](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6vXoNgGyMLgePCYt9jdGHe%2Fe24705de1867c795cf5c4eef6a2fc36b%2Fimage-2.png&w=1080&q=75)

# How Ramp cut tool costs by over 70% and scaled AI across the company

![Ramp](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7p2zRzbkWlj9tbCkSj43R8%2F64d6ae12edd47e0059705fa8b728b4cc%2F773abf09-47fc-466d-8da3-369bf62c120b.png&w=640&q=75)

How Ramp cut tool costs by over 70% and scaled AI across the company
====================================================================

As Ramp's headcount scaled past 2,000 employees, tool fragmentation led to inefficient team work, rising costs, and blocked AI adoption. Notion became their connected, AI-powered workspace—consolidating half a dozen disconnected tools to handle different parts of their teams’ work. With less tool sprawl, Ramp cut per-employee tool costs up to 83% to save hundreds of thousands annually, and has set their teams up to move 3x faster with AI embedded in every workflow.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5WPhqZojxO7UytXWBvKPNL%2Fcac1570cc2ad47d7dbfdb8a63e6f3bd3%2FGeoff.png&w=96&q=80)

Geoff Charles

CPO

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6aJaEpy9axg7ddDsCAV9IW%2Ff0b0bc9fa342a7635103a1d552f01cf8%2FCarmeron.png&w=96&q=80)

Cameron Leavenworth

Manager of Corporate IT

Use cases

Company-wide use, Notion AI

![](https://www.notion.com/customers/ramp)

Play

Please watch it on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fxMr9J_QvY4)

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FcatLookingUp.png&w=384&q=75)

1

Fight back against tool sprawl
------------------------------

Ramp is one of the fastest-growing companies of all time. The company initially embraced a "work how you want" philosophy. But as they rocketed past 1,000 employees, this flexibility created unexpected friction: Teams struggled to collaborate efficiently, knowledge became trapped in silos, and AI proved nearly impossible to implement across disconnected systems. The mounting complexity wasn't just inefficient, it limited Ramp's ability to tap into their greatest asset—their people's shared knowledge.

Notion soon emerged as simple solution for software sprawl at the company. By unifying their scattered landscape of tools—from project management and roadmap planning to documentation and knowledge bases—Ramp could empower its teams to be more productive while making alignment across the company seamless. With AI built in, everyone could focus less on searching for information and more on driving meaningful, collaborative work.

![Consolidate your tool stack with Notion](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/7gY0vqPFCkZOuWLfNw8PCq/2cebf9c5b4a2cc73b16efaa58ecfea68/Comp_3.gif)

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

The problem wasn't just having too many tools. It was that none of them were truly connected. Our teams struggled to find and use information effectively across departments.

![Geoff Charles](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5WPhqZojxO7UytXWBvKPNL%2Fcac1570cc2ad47d7dbfdb8a63e6f3bd3%2FGeoff.png&w=1080&q=75)

Geoff Charles  
CPO

2

One workspace with AI built-in
------------------------------

After evaluating several platforms, Ramp discovered what set Notion apart was how it could reshape their entire work infrastructure. The combination of customizable workflows, real-time collaboration, seamless integration with existing tools, with powerful AI throughout was exactly what Ramp needed to break down silos that threatened to throttle their growth.

In just a few months, Notion has become Ramp’s operating system. Teams from Product to Marketing have migrated off disconnected point solutions, with more consolidation on the way. Now, all organizational knowledge flows through a single connected hub—with AI woven deeply into their daily work:

*   **Enterprise search that delivers answers, not just results:** Notion AI searches across all company knowledge, project docs, and even connected tools like Slack and GitHub, surfacing relevant information in seconds.
    
*   **AI-assisted work with context**: Teams draft documentation, meeting recaps, and project updates, right where they work with the full context of all their organizational knowledge to reduce manual overhead.
    
*   **Automated customer feedback processing**: Product Operations works in lock-step with customer-facing teams using Notion to collect, tag, and relate customer feedback directly to the product roadmap, supporting faster iteration and better alignment with customer needs.
    

![boxes in box](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FuHIfGkHPjbSIsYoxrBdGe%2Fe08a57bc7d0921c1ab1480584239cb95%2Fbox-spots_0003_Layer-19.png&w=1080&q=75)

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

With Notion, every individual person at Ramp has an AI assistant.

![Geoff Charles](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5WPhqZojxO7UytXWBvKPNL%2Fcac1570cc2ad47d7dbfdb8a63e6f3bd3%2FGeoff.png&w=1080&q=75)

Geoff Charles  
CPO

3

Doing more with less
--------------------

Ramp has already seen significant operational improvements and a positive impact on their bottom line. By eliminating redundant software licenses and centralizing work in one tool, the company realizes direct cost savings of hundreds of thousands annually. Per-employee productivity **tool costs dropped by over 70%** compared to their legacy tool stack.

The benefits extend far beyond financial gains. With Notion's AI-powered workspace, employees now find information **up to 60% faster**, with some teams reporting they complete projects three times faster. Each department has discovered more efficient ways of working:

*   **Product & engineering** streamlined roadmap management and feedback workflows with AI-driven status updates and feature request tracking. Leadership has complete visibility into upcoming launches, with automations that alert them whenever timelines shift.
    
*   **Marketing & sales** unified launch planning and sales enablement, leveraging AI to instantly answer questions ranging from campaign analysis to customer call summaries.
    
*   **IT & procurement** enhanced security and scalability through centralized workspace management, documentation, and onboarding.
    

Ramp's transformation wasn't a one-off success—it resulted from a strong partnership and a clear vision for working differently. Notion's customer success and support teams provided detailed implementation guidance, conducted comprehensive training sessions, and continue to collaborate closely with the Ramp team. As Ramp's success story shows, the path to a truly connected, AI-enabled workspace isn't just about deploying new tools—it's about reimagining how teams can work together seamlessly.

“Notion AI removes administrative operational tasks that often plague PM teams, keeping core teams focused on what they're best at - building great products,” says Ramp CPO Geoff Charles.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

Our AI doesn’t just search keywords. It understands your workspace’s actual structure and relationships.

![Cameron Leavenworth](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6aJaEpy9axg7ddDsCAV9IW%2Ff0b0bc9fa342a7635103a1d552f01cf8%2FCarmeron.png&w=1080&q=75)

Cameron Leavenworth  
Manager of Corporate IT

# June 18, 2024 – Notion 2.41: Notion AI now with Slack, GPT-4, and more!

### Instant answers from Slack, Google Drive, Salesforce, Jira, and more

Why search other apps or bug colleagues when Notion AI can search everything for you? Get all the information you need, fast, without leaving the place where your team plans, tracks, and creates.

![ai1](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/B6UKQ8G3t5r4CXia1YsEh/a296494e7ef6cdbbc0e22bd205024def/test_corner_2.gif)

### Unlock your company’s memory

There’s so much tribal knowledge locked away in docs and messages. Tap into it all. Your teams will become smarter and make better decisions.

![Company memory](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7pJgaCFywlJ09yfLLUqeFC%2F1cb5c18bdd354e2c887c336825d5c631%2Fcompany-memory.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Tell AI where to look

Over the next few days, we’re rolling out the ability to `@mention` people, dates, pages, or teamspaces when you search. It helps AI look for relevant information so you get better answers. This was a top request since launching Q&A!

![at-mention](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7AyxxrvXjjd4oA0PZNmknN%2F490093424a44e949edabf7e63fc2ba27%2Fat-mention__1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Now with GPT-4

Notion AI is powered in part by GPT-4, so we decided to give you direct access. Chat privately and securely with Notion AI, whether about historical events or new ideas, and get answers powered by GPT-4’s general knowledge of the world. And Notion AI always cites its sources, so you know if an answer comes from your team’s expertise or from the web.

![GPT4](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FVjGbI6I993EHrqHgdCypI%2Ffee6c011a3a104cb5409657a79c67ee9%2Fchat-gpt.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Plus a few more of your top requests...

*   Quickly access chat history to reuse and edit past AI prompts for faster work
    
*   Use `Find in` to narrow your search to a specific app or teamspace so you get the most relevant responses
    
*   Ask Notion AI to quickly summarize the page you’re on or identify key information to stay up-to-date
    
*   Click on citations to locate and easily review the specific block being cited

# Vercel’s AI-powered system for shipping 35% faster

![Vercel](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3r9vWikWnQJHaYmNhsUzkx%2Fadb28a3515c704d1e73ff7d4d1149318%2FVercel.png&w=640&q=75)

Vercel’s AI-powered system for shipping 35% faster
==================================================

Combining versatility, acceleration, and excellence in both its name and product, Vercel gives developers a frictionless path from code to cloud. This same philosophy powers their internal operations through an AI-enhanced Notion workspace, driving 35% faster shipping and helping teams reclaim up to nine hours weekly per employee. Their unified system has resulted in 89% of employees reporting increased confidence in the quality of their shipped products.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2KG79VK1jt7wNaanShWzHe%2F58ab6c4696cd69782bc15163c4ec8d70%2FVercel_Lee.png&w=96&q=80)

Lee Robinson

VP of Product

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2yg64tsAVY6tBbCe74IEPT%2F04707aaaeec53206f3bc849ff9591b40%2FVercel_Brian.png&w=96&q=80)

Brian Emerick

Technical Program Manager

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6tU41VzEePs2ZvgPV1ncz4%2F50aa2a545b293ef28afe25c73741f500%2Fey-weoy-2025-argentina-guillermo-v1.webp.png&w=96&q=80)

Guillermo Rauch

CEO

Use cases

Notion AI, Company-wide use

1

Move fast without breaking things
---------------------------------

At Vercel, shipping fast isn’t just a goal—it’s their identity. But as the company grew, a challenge emerged: how could they maintain their signature speed while ensuring quality and alignment?

While the company had adopted Notion early on, key planning processes and work across teams had started to become dispersed across disconnected docs and slide decks, with critical context lost in disparate Slack threads and meeting notes. Specialized tools added additional complexity in tracking work across different platforms. This fragmentation risked slowing their rapid development culture with hours lost to search and context-switching across apps, which in turn made it difficult for their teams to scale together effectively.

“As we expanded to twelve product groups, we needed a cohesive system that created some standardization without the bureaucratic red tape,” explains Brian Emerick, Technical Program Manager at Vercel. With [integrations](https://www.notion.com/integrations)
 to over twenty apps in their tool stack and strong organic adoption, Vercel saw an opportunity to create a solution in their Notion workspace that would work for everyone.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Notion makes writing feel like building. When your docs look this good and work this intuitively, decisions happen faster.

![Lee Robinson](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2KG79VK1jt7wNaanShWzHe%2F58ab6c4696cd69782bc15163c4ec8d70%2FVercel_Lee.png&w=1080&q=75)

Lee Robinson  
VP of Product

2

A unified system built on common ground
---------------------------------------

Today, 100% of Vercel employees are using Notion on a daily basis, keeping every team working efficiently together in the same space. At the heart of this space is a simplified system for development processes that keeps everything connected. The result is 35% faster shipping, keeping teams’ momentum high from initial concept through to final release.

A simple Product Areas is the nucleus. It’s where teams access everything they need, from basic team info and meeting notes to roadmaps and project updates attached to PRDs. This hub creates three key parts of their system:

*   **Product Area Plans help teams stay aligned through a centralized roadmap** that connects high-level strategy to actual work. Teams can easily adjust priorities as conditions change, with updates cascading through related materials automatically.
    
*   **The EPD Review process keeps projects moving** through a simple form-based system that captures essential launch information and routes it for leadership feedback while building an accessible knowledge base of past decisions and insights.
    
*   **A Product Launches Calendar streamlines releases** by functioning as air traffic control, giving everyone clear visibility into launch statuses, confidence levels, and owners. Templates maintain quality standards, while system-wide connections and automated notifications ensure all teams stay in sync.
    

![box-spots 0005 Layer-21](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F68yJ0LqOcTMhkfahIlSuwm%2Fbe1e468b5caceb1b289f24d62e7f7a99%2Fbox-spots_0005_Layer-21.png&w=1080&q=75)

Vercel’s Product Areas database is the center of their system for fast, aligned shipping. Each entry opens into a living hub for each product area—rolling up team info, meeting notes, roadmaps, and project updates that are synced with rest of their system.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

Launch speed is everything in our world. We’ve built a culture on reducing time to deployment, and Notion has become instrumental in this process.

![Lee Robinson](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2KG79VK1jt7wNaanShWzHe%2F58ab6c4696cd69782bc15163c4ec8d70%2FVercel_Lee.png&w=1080&q=75)

Lee Robinson  
VP of Product

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

The best part about Notion for a growing company is that it doesn’t lock you into a rigid one-size-fits-all system. Instead, you can adapt and iterate a custom-built solution for your teams as you grow.

![Brian Emerick](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2yg64tsAVY6tBbCe74IEPT%2F04707aaaeec53206f3bc849ff9591b40%2FVercel_Brian.png&w=1080&q=75)

Brian Emerick  
Technical Program Manager

3

Even faster workflows with AI that knows Vercel inside and out
--------------------------------------------------------------

Notion AI automatically distills lengthy PRDs and RFCs into executive summaries, converts meeting discussions into actionable notes, and transforms technical documentation into customer-ready messaging drafts their GTM teams can leverage.

Enterprise Search lets teams instantly find answers across their Notion workspace and apps connected to or chat directly with leading AI models—all within Notion.

The real magic is how the AI proactively surfaces information teams might otherwise miss. Anything they’re working on can be enhanced with Notion AI, which brings in the latest organizational knowledge such as related customer feedback or relevant context from a recent Slack discussion, all to help inform everyone’s work.

As a result, teams across Vercel save an average of **nine hours per week** by letting AI handle these tasks, giving them more time to focus on building.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-rectangle.png)

Our goal is to unburden the engineers so they can focus on implementation. Notion is the backing tool that powers that. It is about the speed and access to find the information you need no matter where you are in the company.

![Brian Emerick](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2yg64tsAVY6tBbCe74IEPT%2F04707aaaeec53206f3bc849ff9591b40%2FVercel_Brian.png&w=1080&q=75)

Brian Emerick  
Technical Program Manager

4

Iterating to greatness
----------------------

Vercel’s teams embody their signature philosophy of “iterate to greatness” (ITG) through their work in Notion. This approach has driven significant improvements in their development process, with surveys showing that **89% of employees are now highly confident** in launch quality.

With Notion as their foundation, Vercel demonstrates how to achieve continuous improvement while maintaining their trademark velocity. Their iterative mindset, combined with Notion’s adaptability, allows them to refine processes without compromising the speed that gives them their competitive edge.

![lego](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1V91pXmJZQVKcwFBx2Ekoy%2F7628424508a83b6d6570c53fd07f8d13%2Flego.png&w=1080&q=75)

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-oval.png)

Notion masters the art of both knowledge capture and transfer. It’s easy to create a space where information is not only preserved but flows naturally to the right people at the right time, which accelerates decision-making and keeps teams aligned.

![Lee Robinson](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2KG79VK1jt7wNaanShWzHe%2F58ab6c4696cd69782bc15163c4ec8d70%2FVercel_Lee.png&w=1080&q=75)

Lee Robinson  
VP of Product

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-blob.png)

You can tell the huge amount of effort that went into keeping Notion so simple. They understand that you can solve a lot of problems with one tool.

# April 15, 2025 – Notion 2.50: Meet Notion Mail

![Hero image](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4GSuINKXB0BBZiIn6NFjGo%2F827f5b4501edc21603f63744e32e3c32%2FWhatsNew_MailHero.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Our mission is to build beautiful tools for your life’s work. Last year, we launched Notion Calendar to help you better manage your most valuable resource—time. Now, we’re rethinking another daily tool that shapes our lives. Email.

Email hasn’t changed in decades! It’s noisy, tedious to manage, and definitely not beautiful.

With Notion Mail, your inbox thinks like you. It organizes itself, drafts your emails, and schedules meetings exactly how you would. It’s flexible (like Notion!) so you can make it your own.

### Organize your inbox with AI

Tell Notion AI what types of emails are important to `auto label`, and it will sort them as they arrive. We’ve been testing auto-labeling with early users, and it’s a crowd favorite! This is a new AI feature that will get smarter over time, so please send us your feedback.

![AI auto label](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/3p3FIMUD58mNdYmRLs3R3S/cbaaf74f7a84e0d7dad33a14542e05ca/Mail_AutoLabeling_v003.gif)

###   
Stay focused with custom views

Split your inbox into custom views that show different focus areas. Sort your views by topic, urgency, sender, or any way you need to stay distraction-free.

![Custom views](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/1VHva4DFSlDOD9SiNPUFKe/1edf530f6dbb2969f55f06834041434a/Mail_CustomViews_Professionals_v001.gif)

###   
Never write the same email twice

Use snippets to create email templates that you can reuse in a click. You can even include attachments and scheduling links! I have snippets for introductions, follow-up messages, and thank-you notes.

![Snippets](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3h00deOrx0wntU8zKHmj9A%2F3abec8e8b88c50b0092ee339f9ce01c7%2F2.50_April2024_Snippet_03__1___1_.webp&w=3840&q=75)

###   
Schedule meetings instantly

We are finally putting an end to the back-and-forth of booking a meeting! Notion Calendar integrates with Notion Mail—just type `/schedule`, mark your availability, and let others pick a time. [Get Notion Calendar free](https://www.notion.com/product/calendar)
 →

![Scheduling](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/7Jg2odWsGtV2QM7p5Mqkrc/b8963348a7fcbb68936fcb8c4a16f971/Schedule_v004.gif)

###   
Write beautiful emails, faster

Just like Notion, you can type `/` to use your favorite content blocks! You can also prompt AI using your space bar. Use it to draft follow-up emails that use your Notion docs for context or just to polish your writing.
