# Crowdcast's operating system drives remote collaboration

![Crowdcast](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F32rymuknctwWfTaMjxwZI%2F3d9393959fec8611ed9d5f0fe78db0c1%2Fcrowdcast.png&w=1080&q=75)

Crowdcast's operating system drives remote collaboration
========================================================

Crowdcast helps creators host online events and connect with their communities. Its fully remote team created a digital "office" in Notion so that everyone runs on the same processes and principles.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3WWRwDPcVlapfPwdXOg4to%2Fe7660c51036f3e0a7a318e6f23a29717%2F04248B9F-CE1D-48C3-8A61-2EF2E82632DA_1.png&w=96&q=80)

Sai Hossain

Founder

Use cases

Project Management, Knowledge Base, Wiki, Notes

1

Project management and execution in one tool
--------------------------------------------

Crowdcast manages projects across five teams — marketing, engineering, sales, success, and operations. Instead of switching between task management tools and the actual work, like in Google Docs, it's all done in Notion. One database tracks all long-term initiatives. And inside that database, every project is a page where all info can be bundled together for easy reference. Click into any project and you'll see who's leading it, related docs, team conversations, and the current status.

![stack of papers](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1VxND4RZSOgbxwxR0eqwZF%2F7a45f896b1480a2c55df3c36bba55415%2Fstack-of-papers.png&w=1080&q=75)

Crowdcast can see projects across five teams in one place.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Most task management apps — like Clickup or Trello — are just pointing to the work that lives scattered in other places. In Notion, all the work lives side by side.

![Sai Hossain](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3WWRwDPcVlapfPwdXOg4to%2Fe7660c51036f3e0a7a318e6f23a29717%2F04248B9F-CE1D-48C3-8A61-2EF2E82632DA_1.png&w=2048&q=75)

Sai Hossain  
Founder

2

Instructions to scale all repeatable processes
----------------------------------------------

With so many different projects in flight, Crowdcast maintains a company-wide list of shared resources to eliminate duplicate work. Security protocols, testimonial requests, instructions for updating the blog, and other docs live in this database for any team member to use. There's even a page to track competitor products, with everybody contributing notes and comparisons in one shared document.

"Having a unified place for processes allows our distributed team to scale while staying on the same page," says Sai.

Need to look up which companies have signed a data processing agreement? Check the list. Need to create a social media graphic? Just find the guide and follow the instructions. Documenting these repeatable processes keeps the quality of work consistent, saving everyone time through compounded learning.

![Crowdcast processes gallery](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6iNhjYDLCgm1Vim3T8PGAX%2F71c3484c4f339f4229bc5e568a5b655f%2Fcropped-desktop__7_.png&w=3840&q=75)

A gallery of instructions and processes can be updated by anyone on the team.

3

Guiding principles for effective remote work
--------------------------------------------

To make sure everyone collaborates seamlessly, Crowdcast maintains a wiki in Notion that acts as the company's virtual headquarters. The page is designed to reflect the company's priorities. The company’s mission is front and center. The team directory connects employees old and new. If there’s a question about using Slack, there’s a communication handbook with examples and reasoning. With full transparency around the company's values, Crowdcast can maintain a healthy remote culture.

![Globe Illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2H7lnx3NNrpdNlKBOU62ME%2F17ede796460c3ce663b687a928043e17%2Fglobe.png&w=1080&q=75)

Everyone knows to check this wiki page first to answer any questions about the company.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

Our environment dictates how we feel, how we behave, and how work happens. As a fully distributed team, Notion helps us create the best digital environment to collaborate.

![Sai Hossain](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3WWRwDPcVlapfPwdXOg4to%2Fe7660c51036f3e0a7a318e6f23a29717%2F04248B9F-CE1D-48C3-8A61-2EF2E82632DA_1.png&w=2048&q=75)

Sai Hossain  
Founder

4

Infinite flexibility to build any workflow
------------------------------------------

For Crowdcast, intentionally designed workspaces lead to better work. Other tools they tried were rigid and didn’t fit their specific needs. Notion provided the building blocks — databases, pages, boards, embeds — that let the team fully customize the way they work.

"In Notion, you can create whatever workspace makes sense for your mind, or your team's shared mind. People and organizations work and think differently. Our tools should adapt accordingly," says Sai.

Each team can set up their own dashboard with whatever is important to them. Sales can track their high-touch deals by status, while the marketing team can see editorial projects by month. And anyone can filter their shared projects database to view only what's assigned to them. This way, Crowdcast can mold their tools for maximum efficiency, rather than letting their tools prescribe how they work.

![Crowdcast sales dashboard](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3zVviAEYBhtNT1W8ufQfld%2F8c90307405cbf6b83471fec39aac208b%2Fcropped-desktop__6_.png&w=3840&q=75)

Each team can pull in information from multiple places to create a dashboard.

Build a digital workspace for your whole company
------------------------------------------------

Notion is free to try and works across many devices.

# August 19, 2025 – Notion 2.53: Offline mode 

### Work offline in Notion

We’re excited to finally say it: you can access pages, capture ideas, and keep work moving on the Notion desktop and mobile app offline. Judging by Reddit, this is _the_ feature everyone’s been waiting for. The most essential blocks work offline, with more on the way soon. [Here's a quick guide to how offline works](https://www.notion.com/help/guides/working-offline-in-notion-everything-you-need-to-know)
 →

![working offline](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/35GokFIEv2tA1MSURIysmD/be818559eb4e85bfb66958036cd969eb/WN-WorkingOfflineTooltip-V3.gif)

### Download pages for offline use

You can download any page and use it without the internet (and even create new ones). Manage them all from the new offline dashboard (`Settings` → `Offline`). Your Recents and Favorites are auto-downloaded for offline use if you’re on the Plus, Business, or Enterprise plan. We’re starting here and we’ll keep making offline in Notion even better.

![toggle](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2WGrMxO4GqDtCqh1tgBgG0%2Ff27e7c56b9cf0bd7cb227057b528d5fd%2FWN-TakePagesOffline-v7.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Notion Mail is now on iOS

We hope Notion Mail has been bringing some joy to your inbox. Now you can stay on top of your emails on the go (even offline!). [Download the Notion Mail iOS app →](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/notion-mail/id6504265936)

![mail ios](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F494ctkM0ch3SQ2CtFtLRZa%2F07bc5c43a8e95056edbbf4cdd51c357b%2FWN-MailiOS-V7__1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### **Use your favorite AI tools with Notion’s MCP**

Notion’s Model Context Protocol (MCP) server lets your AI tools securely reference, create, and update content within Notion. Just connect ChatGPT, Claude, or Cursor to turn prompts into new Notion pages, updated tasks, and more. Check out these quick demos from [ChatGPT](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1948772739843596301)
 and [Claude](https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/1944819149789700215)
, and our [technical docs](https://developers.notion.com/docs/mcp)
 to learn more!

![mcp](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2rKAj3chStVpGH51LWjDH2%2F0a3f6c57257be8e7b6d4b76896d80caa%2Fimage__1___1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Create and manage tasks right in Notion Calendar

Manage your work—tasks, milestones, even personal goals—alongside your schedule. Connect any Notion database with dates to Calendar, then create, schedule, and complete tasks in the same place you plan your time. Here’s a [quick guide](https://www.notion.com/help/use-notion-calendar-with-notion#manage-a-notion-database-in-notion-calendar)
 to get started. [Try out Notion Calendar (it's free](https://calendar.notion.so/?source=august_2025_email)
) →

![cal](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/3UkvCL4utPhDjJeSK94OOo/314f9d4f302e20ba7ae9235e7a42e27d/WN-CalendarTasks__1_.gif)

# October 24, 2024 – Notion 2.46: Forms, Mail, layouts, new automations, and more!

### Watch the recap

![](https://www.notion.com/releases/2024-10-24)

Play

Uh-oh! It looks like your ad blocker is preventing the video from playing.

Please watch it on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vH3Rp3wky-U)

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FcatLookingUp.png&w=384&q=75)

### Introducing forms, right inside Notion!

Forms give you an easy way to capture requests, feedback, RSVPs, or anything you need right where you work. Responses are stored in a Notion database, where you can keep everything organized, visualize the input as a chart, or turn feedback into tasks. No need for an outside tool! You get unlimited forms for free. [Try one out →](https://notion.so/?target=create_form)

![Automations-Professional](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FkhfXyTNFTbJsxO71uphK0%2F6c53350c9e1e62e6c5491b8ceec5dd73%2FAutomations-Professional__1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### **Notion Mail (coming soon!)**

Email hasn’t changed in 20 years. It's cluttered, chaotic, and hard to manage. So we rebuilt it! Notion Mail is fast, minimal, and does all the organizing and back-and-forth of scheduling for you! Best part is “views” that let you customize your inbox to your workflows, just like the rest of Notion. We can’t wait for you to try the preview and hear how it changes the way you work. [Join the waitlist!](https://www.notion.so/product/mail)

### Layouts to customize your page

The way you and your team work is unique and your tools should be flexible enough to match! So we created a way for you to layout your tasks, goals, documents, or whatever you keep in Notion. Your newly organized, beautiful pages will help keep teams focused and efficient. Try it out by hovering over any database page title and clicking `Customize layout`.

### Automations can now send emails

Now you can use an automation to notify people via Gmail (one of your top requests!). Trigger an email when information changes, like when a form has been submitted or the status of a project changes. Soon you’ll be able to send custom web requests to platforms like Zapier and Make to trigger actions in other apps, too.

![Email-Action](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7esaOl8i7eRI5NtB7v7O4Y%2F314a2ec247541455ab1f55e289717bee%2FEmail-Action.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Automate more actions with formulas

This is a true superpower. Database and button automations now support formulas that can complete steps in the background when you trigger an action—a huge time saver. For example, when you mark a task done, you can automatically show how little time it took to complete. [Dig in to learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/database-automations#database-automation-actions)

![Formula-Action](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2rfqlFvCTF2oWQLQt6G3BD%2F740f6798a18031c91bb78da6a2490859%2FFormula-Action.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Introducing the new Marketplace

Have you created an amazing setup or workflow? We’ve made it easier than ever to list and sell your template. Native payments, analytics, reviews and ratings, safeguards to prevent unfair re-distribution—all in the best place for millions of users to discover your work! Whether you’re looking for the perfect template or starting a business—there are creators who make seven figures on Notion!—this is the place. [Go to Notion Marketplace →](https://www.notion.so/templates)

### Custom emojis!

Maybe the best update ever? You can now upload your own emojis! Use them in your page titles or anywhere—just type `/emoji` or `:` followed by its name.

![Custom emoji 2](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F52sPwW9lhik0nwGduKNjz%2Fd8596cdf13ae649d58e4dd7dfd711596%2FCustom_emoji.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Personalize your URLs

Notion Site URLs often have a long string of numbers and characters, but now you can make them exactly what you’d like! Cory, our video producer and resident birder, turned his site [birdingnyc.com/NYC-Birding-Checklist-3ebf732864](https://www.birdingnyc.com/NYC-Birding-Checklist-3ebf7328640148479808d50e338c6a03)
 into [birdingnyc.com/mybirds](http://www.birdingnyc.com/mybirds)
. Just use the `Share` → `Publish` menu. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/manage-your-notion-sites)

![URL personal](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5Dl61NUpb6h0rb0fcd9ZFQ%2Fe7054a79833eef8f361c28c4d7e9106b%2FPersonalize_URLs-min.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Shortcut to Notion features

When searching, type in a keyword like “Home,” “Settings,” or “Templates” to jump to specific places in Notion. Try it with the ⌘ P keyboard shortcut. It’s a small thing that can make you much faster!

![Search for Features 1](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F11bDmXW1mNmR2WYoh2uaKw%2F0fe6a9ddcb997a0ed9ea7cf1dc88dcb7%2FSearch_for_Features_1.png&w=3840&q=75)

### A few more improvements

*   Load database info 15% faster. Even with all these new features, performance is still our top priority.
    
*   Now your page titles, database views, and database pages are aligned ([check it out](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1846230579630481896)
    ). Sometimes the smallest design details matter most!

# July 29, 2024 – Notion 2.43: Suggested edits + new Notion AI features

### Suggested edits

Collaborating on docs used to be a pain, so we made it much easier to track changes! Now any collaborator can make suggestions, and you or a teammate can quickly accept or reject.

![Suggest edits](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/1NAg2VaqHyJcKaOJEGs2ZW/3388bb3ce4f04ac0f5b69d18d606dfd0/Untitled__25_.gif)

### A better Inbox

It can be hard to keep track of all the activity happening in your workspace. So we’ve grouped suggested edits and comments into easy-to-read threads. And as you jump from page to page to resolve comments, your new `Inbox` stays open to keep you focused.

![Better inbox](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/5dGCx1HKRED8pNaeAJa6eW/41b6760d20aac2c7899871a3aaac78c9/Untitled__26_.gif)

### One-click AI skills (no prompt required)

Using AI can feel hard—unless you know how to write a perfect prompt from scratch. These one-click skills make it much easier! Brainstorm ideas, make a diagram, summarize notes, or translate content—all with one click.

![One click AI](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/Ck9TQwFG48MPd4XjsxmyX/0a1569b596c5b10d525b3457ef19b6c8/Multiplayer.gif)

### One AI tool to chat & search

Notion AI can answer any question! It finds the right info from Notion, Slack (soon Google Drive & Github too), and models like GPT-4. No need to search a bunch of tools. And with a full-page window, you have a distraction-free place to chat.

![AI chat box](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/6IQKVvZbOoH0klpNkrWZfx/6fa0ff43868594c5a084a62c21fd089e/Untitled__27_.gif)

### Notion AI global shortcut

Now, if you’re designing in Figma, responding to a customer in Zendesk, or analyzing data in Hex, you can summon Notion AI to answer your questions right then and there. Use the new global shortcut ( `⌘ + shift + J` for Mac, `ctrl + shift + J` for Windows) when you have our [desktop app](https://www.notion.so/desktop)
 installed.

![Shortcut AI](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/4T4IUoNGBLwydVAy5oDhJq/fe11b265639c3ea3d165aa19fc81d099/002_Multiplayer_cleaned.gif)

### Import from Asana

When your projects and docs are in the same tool, your team can stay focused on the real work (no more hunting for info between tools!). In the new-and-improved Asana importer, select which projects you’d like to bring over, and convert them into easy-to-use Notion databases.

![Asana importer improved](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7L4w5tsrjVm7NAvmQlGOAw%2F6054d180af8848a67202344f6108b24f%2FUntitled__72_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### More new features!

*   The upgraded Jira Sync integration offers faster syncs, more customization and upgraded database functionality for your synced Jira Projects and Issues.
    
    [Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/jira)
    
*   Notion Calendar is available as an Android app! Use it to manage multiple Google calendars, open linked Notion docs, and get in-app meeting notifications. [Try it →](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cron.calendar&hl=en_US)
    
*   Now you can add a note when you’re RSVPing Yes, No, or Maybe to an event in Notion Calendar.
    
*   The `•••` menu in your databases is redesigned, with a new `Customize` option and automatic suggested properties.
    
*   The [in-app template gallery](https://www.notion.so/gallery)
     just got a huge redesign! Now you can browse 20k+ templates without leaving your Notion app.

# June 25, 2024 – Notion 2.42: Introducing Notion Sites

### Build a Notion Site in minutes

Launching a website should be easy—not a task that requires yet another tool! So we turned Notion’s one-click “Publish“ button into a full suite of features called Notion Sites. I’m already seeing people create company homepages, job boards, and even entire help centers.

![site1](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/4JHaXjdQfAkmfNWIuEF6hk/81580b920f81b849ae3a3e3c57abe254/publish-multi_rev.gif)

### www.YOURIDEA.com

Connect your own domain or use a custom `notion.site` URL (I put my photography on [ivanzhaophotos.com](https://www.ivanzhaophotos.com/)
 😊).

![email-custom-domain-professional](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5dE8jhOBOcquSNAguf1aDb%2F48a4cbbc77bf314091f17a596dfc2196%2Femail-custom-domain-professional.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Make it yours

You can now customize your top header, choose a light or dark theme, and add the perfect favicon.

![theme v1](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/6mPjh230h9Pj7K67erqv7x/595f664ffc213f73a2524c01d69a234d/theme_v1.gif)

### Build your audience with SEO and Google Analytics

Just because you built it doesn’t mean they’ll come. Add custom metadata to make your site easier to find on search engines. Then, integrate with Google Analytics to track all of your new visitors.

![email-seo-professional](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5x8JrPZr0N7dTjOt7OCaIx%2Fa19c4a206a2842c5c2539a3380ce7e29%2Femail-seo-professional.png&w=3840&q=75)

### `Coming soon` Charts! (We know you’ve been waiting)

We love charts. They turn data into a story. Soon you’ll be able to create bar charts, line charts, and donut charts to visualize progress. Use them for anything you track in Notion: projects, OKRs, sales pipeline, and more. Charts will launch in the coming weeks. They’ll be free to try, with unlimited charts available on the Plus, Business, and Enterprise plans.

![email-charts](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F464LyKO7p7XvwRwEhbLPHS%2F5aeda065cd177cb9340789ddccab5738%2Femail-charts.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Quality of life improvements

*   **Easier commenting:** You can now right-click on a database entry and add a comment without having to actually open it to a full-page view.
    
*   **Better “find”:** `Cmd+f` can now find hidden content in collapsed toggles or within databases. It also does elegant things like closes automatically when you start to edit or navigate to a new page.

# January 17, 2024 – Notion 2.37: Notion Calendar

### Manage time and tasks together

Sync Notion databases to view and update your deadlines and timelines alongside your calendar events.

View Notion databases from the comfort of your calendar.

### Connect and create Notion docs

No more meetings without context or a place to take notes.

Connect events to Notion pages, then open them in one click.

### Work and personal events in one place

Connect multiple Google accounts to manage all your events in one place and avoid conflicts.

If you manage your time across two calendars, like work and personal, use event blocking to automatically block time on each.

### A b**uilt-in scheduling tool**

No need for a separate scheduling tool. Share your availability and allow others to book time.

Use the keyboard shortcut "S" to quickly share your availability with others.

**Other great Notion Calendar features:**

1.  Apps for [desktop](https://www.notion.so/product/calendar/download/desktop)
    , [web](https://www.notion.so/calendar/signup)
    , and [mobile](https://www.notion.so/product/calendar/download/ios)
    .
    
2.  [Download the desktop app](https://www.notion.so/product/calendar/download/desktop)
     to see your schedule, join meetings, and open attachments all from your computer’s menu bar.
    
3.  View your schedule across multiple time zones.
    
4.  Use command menu and shortcuts to work faster.
    
5.  Integrate with Zoom, Google Meet, and other providers.

# September 22, 2023 – Notion 2.33: Automate workflows

### Automate workflows in a database

Automatically set status, assign a task, and more.

### Freeze database columns

Freeze columns while you scroll. Available in table view.

### Formulas 2.0

It’s easier to write formulas, use functions, and get formatted outputs.

![](https://www.notion.com/releases/2023-09-22)

Play

Uh-oh! It looks like your ad blocker is preventing the video from playing.

Please watch it on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SKM0lzCI9lw)

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2Ffront-static%2Fillustrated-icons%2FcatLookingUp.png&w=384&q=75)

### Use AI to translate any property in your database

Translate database content into your teammates’ native language.

### Little fixes = big improvements

*   ✨ If you so desire, you can now use the Notion logo as an icon in your page
    
*   ✨ The three-dot menu of a code block now has an option to `Format code`
    
*   🛷 Evernote & Trello importers have been upgraded and can handle more data
    
*   🛷 The new Universal import works for any ZIP file that contains text, Markdown, CSV, HTML, and other files
    
*   🕛 You can now set your timezone to default to your location or change it manually by going to `Settings and members` → `My settings`
    
*   🕛 Use dynamic references like @me, @today, and @now in people or date properties within a database template
    
*   👇🏾 While setting up a button you can now choose a database template as the default page that gets created
    
*   👇🏾 For Board and Gallery views, there is now a “Wrap all properties” option when configuring the layout

# September 25, 2024 – Notion 2.45: Meet the new Notion AI

### New AI connectors `BETA`: Google Docs, Sheets, & Slides

Now when you ask Notion AI a question, it can search across your trusted knowledge sources to find the answer—from Slack conversations lost in the stream to Google Slides you forgot existed. GitHub, Jira, and more are coming soon! [Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/product/ai/use-cases/find-answers-from-apps)

![Search Notion and connected apps](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/3WtjUwOK9XVfri8FiriP2o/1967582ebfdf334027a4e097a099efdd/Notion_x_AI_Assistant_-_20240905_Linked_Comp_01__3_.gif)

### Generate & edit docs in your own style

It’s like having a staff of editors and writers. Now when you ask Notion AI to generate or edit your writing, you can guide the response with an @mention of any page, such as a style guide, project update, or batch of user feedback. No more generic responses! [Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/product/ai/use-cases/write-in-your-style)

![Generate docs in your own style](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4quhX6zhzhrnaDc9qAKpRV%2Ffe9e800edcdd8ddc90abbdbbb357cfc7%2FNew_Notion_AI_-_Generate_zoomed2.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Analyze PDFs & images

Now Notion AI can pull insights from a lengthy PDF, recommend a workback plan based on a proposal, or explain any uploaded image. Just click the 📎 icon! [Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/product/ai/use-cases/analyze-pdfs-images)

![Analyze PDFs and images](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FduycLjFszfgHF7jmyJqS3%2F1ea952cfce3b3cdc77e588eec34cdb01%2FNew_Notion_AI_-_PDF_zoomed2.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Chat about anything

Notion AI has access to cutting-edge language models like GPT-4 and Claude, so you can (privately!) ask it about any topic. And it’s easy to add the response into your page—no need to copy/paste from a separate tab. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/product/ai/use-cases/chat-about-anything)

![Chat about anything](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5lnN4rTH1nGrqDuJOUm1ii%2Fecf4300c4b2750cc1e26be4c0addd71a%2FNew_Notion_AI_-_Chat_zoomed2.png&w=3840&q=75)

### **Helps with questions about Notion**

Notion does a lot, and now Notion AI can help you get even more from your workspace. Rather than search our help doc, watch YouTube videos, or bug a teammate, just ask Notion AI a question or select Notion Help Center from the source menu.

![Get Help with Notion](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5VVDSEQuQ46mivTY58cLmM%2F6431cdd540d9619b98de50eb65d1e9e9%2FNew_Notion_AI_-_Notion_Help_-_zoomed.png&w=3840&q=75)

### **Suggests how it can help**

When you highlight text, Notion AI suggests relevant ways to help. It may offer to `Explain` the text or help you `Improve Writing`. One click and you get what you need—no prompting. Teams have reported a major uptick in the value of Notion AI with this new, easy-to-use design!

![Suggests how it can help](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5OYYJdPxgzyV2Gm0POQYk7%2Fdd3e51fcc0eedde094e6b8f74376fe25%2FNew_Notion_AI_-_Toolbar_-_zoomed.png&w=3840&q=75)

# Science writer Swapna Krishna’s project management system

Science writer Swapna Krishna’s project management system
=========================================================

As a freelance writer, Swapna Krishna spends her days writing about space, science, technology and — sometimes — Star Trek. Besides creating up to 7 pieces of content a week, she’s also balancing the business of writing: deadlines, invoices, notes, travel. The project management system she built in Notion helps her organize all her ongoing work.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6pU8DNVDTFPGr0JjxHhAHK%2F1dd70e72415d0776bbbbb513c3b014ab%2Fswapna-krishna.png&w=96&q=80)

Swapna Krishna

Freelance writer

Use cases

Personal Tasks

1

Knowing the status of each freelance project at a glance
--------------------------------------------------------

At any time, Swapna has a handful of freelance work to go along with her full-time marketing job. Knowing the status of each project became a job within itself. Was this pitch accepted by the publication? Were edits to that piece reviewed? Did an invoice go out? On deadline, moments spent looking though apps or email for these answers were moments wasted.

![boxes](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FHDdYl6aJn8RjZyaB8RgHT%2Fd7e07c5d352dbc1dccb82f61d04b4301%2Fboxes.png&w=1080&q=75)

![Swapna uses a Notion board to organize all her freelance projects.](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F694FabaY8cbHrCQtUXaW8A%2F807a0bd5652162c1923adde900535bf0%2FSwapna1.png&w=3840&q=75)

Swapna uses a Notion board to organize all her freelance projects.

### One board to see all her work

Now, Swapna uses a single Notion board to organize all her projects. Each column represents a phase in her process. And every freelance assignment is a card, filed according to where the project currently stands. Once a piece is submitted to her editor, it's dragged to that column. If she needs to fact-check, there's a column for that too. Using Notion, Swapna gets a complete view into every project, so it's clear what's done and what needs to happen next.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Notion has truly revolutionized the way I'm able to work because I can see everything I'm working on at once, and know what it is I have to do.

2

Tasks, context & travel — all at her fingertips
-----------------------------------------------

Each freelance project Swapna juggles comes with its own collection of specific tasks or notes, whether it's a list of scientists to speak with or articles to read on the subject. Without a place to collect resources, it'd be easy to lose track of the vital information that helps turn a draft into a polished piece.

![stack of papers](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1VxND4RZSOgbxwxR0eqwZF%2F7a45f896b1480a2c55df3c36bba55415%2Fstack-of-papers.png&w=1080&q=75)

Swapna keeps all the information for every article neatly bundled together.

### Extensive notes, bundled with each task

Swapna now makes every project its own Notion page, which each live in the board where she tracks all projects. This is especially helpful when she travels — like when she attended the Star Trek Picard press junket and premiere. Hotel booking, airfare and event schedules — normally scattered across email and apps — were all in one place. She even created a sub-page for estimated travel time between meetings in LA traffic. Instead of digging through a digital haystack, Swapna knows exactly where to find what she needs.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

I have to be really organized because otherwise, stuff will fall through the cracks. Notion pages are like a record of everything I need for any project.

3

Different workspaces keep work & life on track
----------------------------------------------

It's easy for work-life to spill over into life-life. Swapna is a new mother (more than a full-time job), which she balances with being a freelancer, a wife, and a full-time content creator. She made a commitment to prioritize family this year, which means maintaining strict working hours.

![Lighthouse ](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5t0X9gE2uE6ZbsiYw8VuQu%2Fb44e3fdbbfe4245c708ea519eb1f331f%2Flighthouse.png&w=1080&q=75)

![Swapna keeps work and home life separate with different workspaces.](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1AqyfbLSR1dcY6Gnve28jk%2Fd215985c219c83a2f909aaab6686f84b%2FSwapna3.png&w=3840&q=75)

Swapna keeps work and home life separate with different workspaces.

### One for home, one for writing

Swapna has two Notion workspaces. Outside of work, she uses Notion to be productive in her home life, too — i.e. did the babysitter get paid this weekend? — while keeping her commitment to stay family-focused outside of freelancing. Even when she travels to cover a story, she creates a Notion page for her husband with a checklist of everything needed on the home front. Swapna's two worlds meet in Notion, while staying separate enough to give her peace of mind.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

Notion has the flexibility to be anything you need it to be without being overwhelming.

Start building your task tracker
--------------------------------

Notion is free to try and works across many devices.
----------------------------------------------------

Creado para garantizar la seguridad de los datos.
-------------------------------------------------

*   ![Icono de un escudo](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fshield.6d5399bd.png&w=256&q=75)Cumple con el RGPD y la CCPA.
*   ![Icono de un candado](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Flock.fdf6e473.png&w=256&q=75)Tus datos no se usan para entrenar a la IA.
*   ![Icono de una insignia](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fbadge.9389f4bc.png&w=256&q=75)Certificado por la ley HIPAA y el estándar SOC 2 (Tipo 1).

Preguntas frecuentes
--------------------

¿Con qué proveedores de correo electrónico es compatible Notion Mail?

Notion Mail se integra con las cuentas de Google y Gmail.

¿Cuándo estará disponible Notion Mail en dispositivos móviles?

La aplicación para iOS estará disponible en breve. Notion Mail también estará disponible para Android en 2025.

¿En qué idiomas está disponible Notion Mail?

Por el momento Notion Mail está disponible en inglés. Muy pronto lo estará en 13 idiomas más (¡igual que Notion!).

¿Puedo gestionar varias cuentas de correo en Notion Mail?

Sí, puedes utilizar varias cuentas de Notion para gestionar diferentes correos electrónicos. Por el momento no ofrecemos una bandeja de entrada unificada que muestre los correos de todas tus cuentas en un solo lugar.

¿Qué estándares de seguridad cumple Notion Mail?

Notion Mail cuenta con la certificación SOC2 y cumple con la ley HIPAA, al igual que Notion. También cumple las mismas condiciones y políticas de privacidad en las que ya confías. [Más información.](https://www.notion.com/es-es/help/notion-mail-security-practices)

# How Notion helped one agency consolidate tools and slash meeting overhead by 30%

![Raw Studio](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3FkzogFOMBbrwyjyXoV1lT%2Fc2027acd8659ac07468e28d94297cefc%2FRaw-logo.png&w=640&q=75)

How Notion helped one agency consolidate tools and slash meeting overhead by 30%
================================================================================

Raw Studio is an award-winning digital creative agency based in Sydney that replaced half a dozen different tools for project management, interfacing with their clients, and running their business into one unified Notion workspace. Replacing all these different tools and running their agency on Notion has helped them not only reduce their cost overhead but their communication overhead as well. Now their team can spend less time on planning and coordinating work and more time actually doing exceptional work at an even faster pace.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F58tQVQppclq8bbnkKPnjv5%2Ff125624e2f6cb5c636c9fe356876164e%2FRaw_Studios_Daniel_Randovich_.png&w=96&q=80)

Daniel Radovich

Managing Director & Lead Designer

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5SggP4PetVFv4yEpch2TRl%2F17be2342b72a72193ac14a62d82b5c31%2FRaw_Studios_Philippe_Hong.png&w=96&q=80)

Philippe Hong

Founder & Director

Use cases

Project Management, Knowledge Base

1

The hidden cost of multiple tools when you want to move fast
------------------------------------------------------------

Raw Studio is a bespoke digital creative agency that has attracted clients of all sizes across 50 different industries. Whether it's a startup like Snappr launching an MVP or a global brand like Westfield redesigning its mobile app, companies choose Raw Studio because they want to bring their solutions to life faster than they could in-house or with any other agency.

Their track record of successfully taking on projects of all sizes is built on a foundation of design sprints, a well-established methodology for rapid iteration, and constant client feedback. But the tools they were using to manage their work, client relationships, and agency operations were proving too rigid and disconnected.

”Each design sprint requires its own board, feedback, and documentation, but everything was scattered across different tools,” explains Daniel. “We couldn’t even view tasks across projects or onboard new team members without navigating multiple platforms.”

The fragmentation was costly, both in time and creativity. With team members spending up to five hours weekly in client sync meetings and juggling multiple tools that put a strain on their focus and productivity, Raw Studio needed a flexible solution that could bring all parts of their complex design sprint process into one tool, all while streamlining client collaboration.

2

A single hub for all projects, internal processes, and external communications
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When Raw Studio began exploring Notion, they immediately saw the potential to revolutionise their project management and client collaboration in one space. "We needed a solution that could handle everything from initial client conversations to final deliverables, all while keeping our internal team and external stakeholders in perfect sync," explains Daniel.

The team started by creating a centralised teamspace that serves as its operational hub. Here, every project has a dedicated page with custom workflows tailored to Raw Studio's specific needs, whether it's for UX design, branding, or development work. This customisation was crucial, as Daniel notes: "Other tools can lock everyone into to specific ways of working, but Notion allows you to adjust your workflows to exactly how you want them for your business.”

The most transformative change was their approach to client collaboration. Raw Studio now invites clients into carefully structured Notion pages that serve as their client portal, providing unprecedented transparency into project progress. "Previously, it was challenging to keep clients updated without scheduling constant meetings," says Radovich. "Now, clients can track progress in real-time, access all project materials in one place, and stay informed without the need for constant check-ins."

![boxes in box](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FuHIfGkHPjbSIsYoxrBdGe%2Fe08a57bc7d0921c1ab1480584239cb95%2Fbox-spots_0003_Layer-19.png&w=1080&q=75)

Raw Studio's project pages function as client portals, streamlining collaboration by combining project details, assets, and milestones all in the same space. Their Kanban board provides clients with real-time progress tracking and direct designer access.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Notion makes our workflows so much more efficient and intuitive, so we can move faster than ever and easily keep our clients engaged along the way.

![Philippe Hong](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5SggP4PetVFv4yEpch2TRl%2F17be2342b72a72193ac14a62d82b5c31%2FRaw_Studios_Philippe_Hong.png&w=2048&q=75)

Philippe Hong  
Founder & Director

3

Running their entire agency on Notion
-------------------------------------

Raw Studio's journey with Notion soon evolved from simple project management into a complete operational transformation. This new interconnected system allows teams to access information through custom views tailored to their roles, while database relations seamlessly connect projects, clients, and team members.

At the heart of their workspace is a sophisticated CRM system. Using synced databases, Raw Studio can link basic client information alongside detailed records of project history, preferences, and future opportunities. This comprehensive view allows them to maintain strong client relationships and quickly reference past work when similar projects arise.

Next, they developed a talent management system to help them track both internal team members and external contractors. Using database relations, their able to match all their talent in one database to another database of upcoming projects. This ensures the right expertise is always available for each unique project requirement.

Finally, they created a business operations hub where database views and formulas give leadership real-time visibility into revenue forecasting and resource allocation. The connected databases provide both high-level insights and detailed breakdowns, enabling more strategic decision-making.

![Raw2](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1r1usqEQKbvGHcFAebVNLu%2F6675dffc34a13036c1dff8e9daf40ee9%2FRaw2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Raw Studio's database of projects is synced with their CRM database also in Notion. This allows them to analyze all of their project metrics agency-wide and per client while keeping client records automatically up to date as each project progresses.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

Having everything in Notion means we're not just more efficient but we're also more strategic. We can spot patterns, anticipate needs, and make informed decisions because all our data is connected and accessible. It's created a single source of truth for our entire agency.

![Daniel Radovich](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F58tQVQppclq8bbnkKPnjv5%2Ff125624e2f6cb5c636c9fe356876164e%2FRaw_Studios_Daniel_Randovich_.png&w=2048&q=75)

Daniel Radovich  
Managing Director & Lead Designer

4

A “productivity power house” that saves 5+ hours weekly and over $20k in software costs
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

For Raw Studio, Notion is more than just a tool—it's become the foundation that enables their agency to deliver exceptional results seamlessly and at scale. By consolidating their operations into Notion, they've seen measurable improvements across their business that directly impact their bottom line.

Managing all their projects in one connected space has allowed Raw Studio to eliminate five hours per week in client meetings through automated updates that keep clients informed of project progress in real-time. And they continue to find new ways to streamline their workflows, including joining the Notion Mail beta to bring their email inboxes directly into Notion too. Since everything they need now lives in Notion, the team can be more productive without the constant disruption of digging through scattered docs and spreadsheets or switching between different apps.

Beyond these productivity gains, consolidating their tech stack in Notion has also allowed them to replace project management tools like Trello and Zapier, phase out separate tools for docs and file storage like Google and Dropbox, and minimise web development costs by using Notion Sites—all resulting in over $20,000 in annual software savings.

But perhaps most significantly, Raw Studio has achieved what many agencies strive for: a seamless operation where information flows effortlessly between team members and clients.

![House](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1UATJT9qyoqw8z9c1M9GaB%2F4bc1b3fdc8da9c3e19547b55043f81af%2Fhouse.png&w=1080&q=75)

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

Notion has fundamentally transformed our operations. By centralising all project tasks, client communications, and resources in one platform, we’re saving our team hours every week that used to be spent juggling multiple tools. It’s like having our own productivity powerhouse.

![Daniel Radovich](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F58tQVQppclq8bbnkKPnjv5%2Ff125624e2f6cb5c636c9fe356876164e%2FRaw_Studios_Daniel_Randovich_.png&w=2048&q=75)

Daniel Radovich  
Managing Director & Lead Designer

Want to build your team’s productivity powerhouse?
--------------------------------------------------

# Pitch's marketing system keeps output high and quality consistent

![Pitch](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6fp9eFwBTHUxn8UBmXDWHr%2F4490c3ccea05193eed453114fcff7097%2Fpitch-workmark.png&w=384&q=75)

Pitch's marketing system keeps output high and quality consistent
=================================================================

After founding task juggernaut Wunderlist, Christian Reber is back with Pitch, making presentation creation more collaborative. Notion, its pick for project management, proves especially helpful for the marketing team.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1o7Y8QOStnAbgrkLJ3eC5W%2F60ba8fd77358ab1fa7cf1181cb1f5da6%2Fkate-donahue.png&w=96&q=80)

Kate Donahue

Sr. Marketing Manager

Use cases

Project Management, Knowledge Base

1

Creating a system for all types of marketing requests
-----------------------------------------------------

The marketing team at Pitch is constantly pulled in multiple directions, whether it’s for in-product copy or website assets. Since its inception, marketing has used Notion to systemize and scale the request process. Each type of ask has its own template — with a set of prompts to collect necessary links and highlight important dates. This makes for thoughtful handoffs that set expectations for all teams, and ensures marketing has enough context from the start to move faster from end to end.

![checklist illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7jm99M3VUXjuczgmwx8tni%2F11404719d24cee91df615ae9641d98f7%2Fclipboard.png&w=1080&q=75)

Pitch's marketing team uses database templates to make requests seamless.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

If someone shares an idea with the marketing team, Notion helps us make sure that it has the right context so we don’t have to go back and forth so many times to get it right.

![Kate Donahue](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1o7Y8QOStnAbgrkLJ3eC5W%2F60ba8fd77358ab1fa7cf1181cb1f5da6%2Fkate-donahue.png&w=2048&q=75)

Kate Donahue  
Sr. Marketing Manager

2

A roadmap that connects all teams
---------------------------------

Updates to projects happen at light speed. And if they’re not tracked and communicated out to the broader team, disorganization sets in even quicker. That’s why Pitch uses linked databases in Notion for cross-functional transparency between departments, giving every team a view into the status of current projects.

All tasks are tracked in Pitch’s company-wide roadmap. Then this same database is added to every team’s homepage in Notion, filtered to show only their tasks. If an update is made to a task one place, it’s immediately changed everywhere else — making for a living, breathing project management system that gives everyone focus and transparency at the same time.

“The earlier we create the connective tissue, the better we can coordinate,” says Sr. Marketing Manager Kate Donahue.

![Pitch -- point 2](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F2bnnxXnS0sHeXo8fj50drZ%2F02c13b65bf45ffaba02471e611d212be%2Fcropped-desktop.png&w=3840&q=75)

Pitch's company-wide roadmap.

3

A toolbox that keeps a growing team on brand
--------------------------------------------

To bring marketing requests to life and ensure they remain on brand, everyone on the Pitch team needs the correct tools for the job — the same assets, guidelines, messaging, and design systems. So the marketing team centralizes its resources in Notion, where all these essential tools are easily accessible and up to date. People don’t have to reference past projects or find stakeholders in order to make progress, and those time savings compound.

![tools](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F7ib3dWcEY1n9AEiQZoIfTS%2F282343ab2ff33358b1dc955d575a2718%2Ftools.png&w=1080&q=75)

All the assets Pitch's marketing team needs to do great work easily found in one place.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

As a marketing team, it’s important to create autonomy so you can cover more ground. That’s way easier when you have everything in a central place, like we do in Notion.

![Kate Donahue](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1o7Y8QOStnAbgrkLJ3eC5W%2F60ba8fd77358ab1fa7cf1181cb1f5da6%2Fkate-donahue.png&w=2048&q=75)

Kate Donahue  
Sr. Marketing Manager

4

Clearer handoffs with remote teammates
--------------------------------------

Kate’s brand team is based in Berlin but includes remote employees who live all over the country. Under the status quo, remote team members might lose creative context, leading to rounds of fruitless revision. Instead, Notion has helped sharpen communication to a fine point.

“It’s always clear what’s on anyone’s plate, the scope of the project, or deadlines,” says Kate. “And it helps remote teams tell us exactly how much capacity they have so we don’t get stuck.”

Custom documentation in Notion helps Pitch collaborate with the broader team no matter where they’re located to arrive at a polished product faster.

![Pitch Design Projects](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3TQSD7hoMAYC7T2RpsygXG%2F1823b4c7bd94eef1a75e7af4e0600418%2Fcropped-mobile.png&w=3840&q=75)

Design projects and asset requests are tracked and tagged in a database.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

Notion helps us rely on and grow remote teams sustainably. We’re continuing to hire more and more folks outside Berlin, so this is a critical skill for us.

![Kate Donahue](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1o7Y8QOStnAbgrkLJ3eC5W%2F60ba8fd77358ab1fa7cf1181cb1f5da6%2Fkate-donahue.png&w=2048&q=75)

Kate Donahue  
Sr. Marketing Manager

# Chipper Cash drives more intentional work with Notion

![Chipper Cash](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FSwaAiNPa5htLXgY4fq9t3%2F5d92b4287b961f749ede707c598d2b8e%2Fchipper-cash_1__1_.png&w=640&q=75)

Chipper Cash drives more intentional work with Notion
=====================================================

Chipper Cash helps three million people send and receive money across Africa and beyond. Its global team adopted a culture of documentation on Notion to cut unnecessary meetings and produce a single source of truth for every idea, task, and project.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FmWy7PtKVNk6HWiKb7NroZ%2F71ec7905b11b24e049312fc181949ab4%2FImage_from_iOS__2_.png&w=96&q=80)

Maijid Moujaled

Co-founder and President

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4LydMNVeeX75RQImojdCNG%2F2a902484d20778af2e350705e3071fdb%2FImage_from_iOS__2_.png&w=96&q=80)

Hasan Luongo

VP of Growth Marketing

Use cases

Notes, Project Management

1

One workspace.  
All info easy to find.
---------------------------------------

With a rapidly expanding business, Chipper Cash knew their knowledge management system needed to change, too. Writing things down wasn't the problem—it was all the random files floating around Dropbox, Google Drive, and Microsoft Office. No one knew what was usable or up-to-date.

With Notion, Chipper Cash shifted to a more intentional system to document their work. Each project, whether it's a marketing campaign or feature spec, has one doc with all updates recorded. It's a more efficient and trusted system of documentation.

![flying-pages](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F510gDE1EsMqHrEq8QcjGjs%2F4b3e00c6f57229f49b71ed9f520982aa%2Fflying-pages.png&w=1080&q=75)

From conceptualization to execution, project pages track the progress of all of Chipper Cash's projects.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Having all project decisions written down and shared across the organization doesn't eliminate the need for questions, but it's so much easier to find answers.

![Maijid Moujaled](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FmWy7PtKVNk6HWiKb7NroZ%2F71ec7905b11b24e049312fc181949ab4%2FImage_from_iOS__2_.png&w=2048&q=75)

Maijid Moujaled  
Co-founder and President

2

A unified roadmap to manage increasingly complex launches
---------------------------------------------------------

As part of this culture shift, Chipper Cash created one database for all projects in flight, linking together previously disparate data. For a startup that grew from 700,000 users to 3.5 million in one year, having one roadmap was a blessing — especially since they’re launching features that require more cross-functional work than ever.

“There are so many more levels of detail, so things take longer to build now,” says Hasan. “It's not just me and the co-founder hacking something over the weekend."

With all project specs, discussions, and assets collected together, people can focus on their work, rather than searching for information and sending emails.

![Chipper Cash 2](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5w2mefwnoyklt3n2DqSe1Q%2F844f7aeb8b7c7a9f33c84f2fc445b01f%2FChipper_Cash2.png&w=3840&q=75)

Chipper Cash’s 100+ employees coordinate their work from a central roadmap, helping them prioritize their work and stay aligned.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

Notion doesn’t help us ship things faster — it helps us ship better.

![Hasan Luongo](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4LydMNVeeX75RQImojdCNG%2F2a902484d20778af2e350705e3071fdb%2FImage_from_iOS__2_.png&w=2048&q=75)

Hasan Luongo  
VP of Growth Marketing

3

Asynchronous updates that replace meetings
------------------------------------------

A growing team also ushered in more meetings. Product in particular was holding multiple meetings a week to report on progress, challenges, and opportunities.

With Notion, the team shifted to more asynchronous communication. Instead of relying on standing meetings to share knowledge, people build living project documents with sections for tasks, questions, and discussions.

When an engineer solves a problem or needs support, they immediately update the relevant project document, rather than waiting for a progress meeting.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

Notion has reduced meetings by 15%. Across 100 people, that’s a significant saving.

![Maijid Moujaled](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2FmWy7PtKVNk6HWiKb7NroZ%2F71ec7905b11b24e049312fc181949ab4%2FImage_from_iOS__2_.png&w=2048&q=75)

Maijid Moujaled  
Co-founder and President

4

Request templates that anticipate questions
-------------------------------------------

Another team that's benefited from more intentional communication is design. Instead of vague requests for graphics or landing pages, they use a template in Notion.

The template prompts people to think more deeply about what they actually need. That way, the conversation can jump to more informed discussion and designers can make progress faster. There's no need to chase teammates on Slack for answers to basic questions.

"The Notion template worked so well with our design team that we're rolling it out to other departments," says Hasan.

![Chipper Cash 4](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1XlQ8AVj3ECy84aXhladef%2F5d0adaca863c68197e7a857615098666%2FChipper_Cash4.png&w=3840&q=75)

Most employees don’t know what designers need to get started. Chipper Cash’s request template keeps them on track.

Create a more intentional team culture
--------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------

# July 10, 2025 – Notion 2.52: Everything is database

### Databases got a makeover

From clearer names and cleaner tables to simpler settings, gentler visuals, and fewer distractions, databases just got much simpler! The new “+ property” makes naming and picking a property much smoother. You can now group, insert, or rename properties right from the property menu. Web, desktop, mobile—all refreshed! [See the full list of updates](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1935380233265496134)
.

![Databases BeforeAfter](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/4k4HT89M8G2ZIcnu1WDlBq/8ad02a166d6ec32f55fe33f2139249f6/Databases_BeforeAfter.gif)

### New `Feed` view to review content

Like turning your database into a blog feed! Use it to scroll through status updates, user research, bug reports, and more—then add comments and emoji reactions. 👀

Just add a new view to your database and select `Feed`.

### Chat with your database in research mode

Now Notion AI can answer extra-complex questions about your databases, drawing info from across properties and any notes inside your database pages. For example, “Which accounts in @Sales CRM have call notes that mention European data residency?”

Try it by going to `Home`, selecting the `Research` tab, and @-mention a database in your question.

![image - 2025-07-10T105650.969](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5wwGubpl3t4WzQcloaU6N0%2F896114d6e50bbbae2889a1dda3fb834d%2Fimage_-_2025-07-10T105650.969.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Database row permissions (coming soon)

Notion’s #2 most requested feature is nearly here! (#1 is offline mode, also [coming](https://x.com/ivanhzhao/status/1917945420975841318)
 !) You’ll be able to grant permissions by database row. The person assigned to those database pages won’t be able to see the rest of the database. Stay tuned.

![db perms](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4d1ieP9WoS1G87YebehBRP%2F3f2cef10fe0ad8039e074f6471679102%2Fimage_-_2025-07-10T105656.355.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Search Gmail with Enterprise Search

Have 17,362 messages in your Gmail inbox? Notion AI can help. Search through older archives and new emails to get the latest updates on a project or summarize a long thread. We maintain strict privacy controls, so each user can only see their own inbox. Available on Business and Enterprise plans.

![Gmail - Tab](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3i7KXTygOXvIpjqjoSyV3M%2F4a5cf6ee4747f800a6ec05780e27c0d0%2FGmail_-_Tab.png&w=3840&q=75)

### …and search across Linear

Managing projects in Linear? Notion AI can now search those projects and issues—including titles, assignees, creators, and comments. Ask questions like, “What blockers are assigned to me this week?” and get instant answers with citations, all while respecting your Linear permissions. Available on Business and Enterprise plans.

![Linear - tab](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F28icEXv04vFDaY9FJY1Zk9%2F01810dc062dc9257c216f7fa2ee414e9%2FLinear_-_tab.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Build with Replit, manage with Notion

Vibe coding continues to amaze us. Now you can connect your apps and websites to a Notion database to manage all the content: visual assets, posts, and tasks. Check out this Replit [demo](https://x.com/mattppal/status/1927364391281799504)
.

![Replit](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F4fGa3liSBas1cpxtlMsrFh%2F2d90bc38837af8ed39854ef5e640ec31%2FReplit.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Importing CSVs just got a lot cleaner

Now you can select which Notion Property Type you want to use for each CSV column, making imports so much tidier! Simply upload and create a new database or merge your CSV with an existing database.

![An animation depicting Notion AI transcribing a meeting and then creating an AI summary of its contents.](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/2Rf23fXsHWjLMA4jc9zsSF/301b81dd2d56d0775786572a1cc67e8d/Notion_AIFW_WhatsNew_AIMeetingNotes_1200x900_v002.gif)

### Lots of improvements!

*   Databases are way [easier to use on mobile](https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/1935737823707165156)
    . Tap, view, edit, or create filters with a couple flicks of your thumb.
    
*   Manage any Notion database in Notion Calendar if it includes dates. Just click into the view and select
    
    `Open in Calendar`. Great for tracking deadlines.
    
*   Search your PDFs in Notion, Google Drive, SharePoint and OneDrive with Enterprise Search!
    
*   Google Drive AI Connector can now search across more file types: .docx, pptx, xlsx, csv, and PDFs.
    
*   Organization owners can now place users under [legal hold](https://www.notion.com/help/legal-holds)
     and preserve all the docs they’ve created, edited, or viewed—preventing deletion of important files.

# May 31, 2023 – Notion 2.30: Project Management

We know many of you wanted us to make [project management](https://www.notion.so/product/projects)
 in Notion easier and more powerful – so that’s what we did. We filled in feature gaps, revamped templates and setup flows, and added the power of AI. Here's what's new:

### **AI Autofill, a first of its kind**

Automatically generate summaries, action items, project updates and more.

[Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/creating-and-editing-with-ai#autofill-databases-with-ai)

### **Out-of-the-box setup**

Streamlined project creation so you can get up and running with ease.

![projects templates whats new](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1ZfAhTrezgPEzjSWCGwiuk%2F0ea8a7bdd19c0bd5b5b8b91f7106bc19%2Fprojects_templates_whats_new.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Try Notion Projects →](http://www.notion.so/modal?pjm=true)

### **Notifications to stay in the loop**

Get updates on task and project details you care about.

![updates notifs whats new](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6UwK4c7DArPMKfPtfdao10%2Fdbd8bcca49d37d40212194b8850c42b8%2Fupdates_notifs_whats_new.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Try Notion Projects →](http://www.notion.so/modal?pjm=true)

### **Sprint plans, upgraded and streamlined** **`beta`**

New pre-configured sprint workflow now available in beta.

![sprints whats new](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1eTFaMUntxPAOHqTJTUj1b%2F1f98b84f8654a365248a8a5abe3ccce9%2Fsprints_whats_new.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/guides/product-engineering-notion-sprint-planning)

### **Unique IDs for every issue**

Easily reference any issue or task from anywhere.

![unique id whats new](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F34jhNQRJtdxypL2u2M11qk%2F7ba9cad1bbb791dd54985d9706515a6d%2Funique_id_whats_new.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/unique-id)

### **Real-time GitHub integration**

Notion tasks auto-update when their PR status changes and more.

![github in sprints whats new](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3Aittp39mF5ijqjObZYxay%2F3c55eb17ac884170430fdc887c79d15f%2Fgithub_in_sprints_whats_new.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/integrations/github)

### **Import projects from Asana**

Move your teams, projects, tasks and all other fields into Notion with the Asana importer.

![asana importer whats new](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F3ULHmmANkVSfTSSRlJ1xXm%2Fa0703af7ff307fcfedb79c334edd7454%2Fasana_importer_whats_new.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/asana)

### Coming soon…

*   `Connected Properties` link Figma and Google Drive files to tasks
    
*   A new `My Tasks` section to see all your tasks across projects
    
*   A redesigned `Quick Capture` experience to record new ideas and tasks
    
*   New `Automations` to trigger actions as task details change

# February 26, 2024 – Notion 2.38: Home

### A Home for all your work

Find recent pages, tasks, and trending content from across your workspace.

### My tasks, in one place

In Home, easily manage all tasks assigned to you in the new My tasks view. [Learn more →](https://notion.so/help/home-and-my-tasks)

### Automate with database buttons

In addition to Home, you can now create a button to assign, approve, upvote, or automate any other action. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.so/help/guides/make-work-more-efficient-database-button-property)

### Take actions from mobile notifications

Reply, archive, or mark notifications as read — all without opening the app. Haven’t tried Notion on mobile yet? [Download here](https://www.notion.so/mobile)
.

### Shorten messy URLs

Long URLs that took over pages now get shortened automatically.

![Url shorten](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5MrsOR03ASKA5Ysn2Y3xp4%2F26468974d3f4d3c844cbe6a7a9a3e68c%2FRelease_email_visuals.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Hide weekends in calendar view

Keep your weekends free. Toggle off `Show weekends` in the layout of a calendar database.

![Hide Weekends Release Visuals](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F762M0cKkX3GUUm9hBU8WHv%2F3f35a2197bf69e69640c62e24bc079eb%2FHide_Weekends_Release_Visuals.png&w=3840&q=75)

### More improvements, big and small

*   New [Monday importer](https://www.notion.so/help/monday)
     to easily migrate your projects into Notion.
    
*   New option to hide page icons by toggling off `Show page icon` in a database’s `…` menu.
    
*   Rows in a database are logically sorted for you using the name of the row.
    
*   You can now change the color of a button.
    
*   Easily move pages to other locations on mobile using a better `Move to` menu.

# February 18, 2025 – Notion 2.48: Set up Notion in one click, Calendar updates, and more

### Let AI help you build

Create custom setups instantly with AI! Describe what you need (you can be as detailed as you’d like), and AI will build your use case. This is a huge timesaver. Just type `/database` and select `Build with AI`.

![AIDatabases Pro (1)](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/OEeetlttdnXZ70pY2QaJ6/fa18dbfa75c0ecaec00e045d76ecd26f/AIDatabases_Pro__1_.gif)

### Workflows in one click

We made a bunch of pre-built setups for you, like Task Trackers, Meeting Notes, and Brainstorm Sessions. They're easy to customize, too. Just create a new page, click `database`, and select `More templates`.

![OneClick Rev (1)](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/5X4NYrpkyC4Df7VpF7TyMz/ac2907f9eb135dd88fca25a602c7343e/OneClick_Rev__1_.gif)

### Do more with recurring tasks

Automatically update pages on a schedule with recurring database automations. Set and forget tasks like weekly reminders, or auto-generate weekly status docs for projects marked as `In Progress`.

![recurring](https://images.ctfassets.net/spoqsaf9291f/4xx73VRkrdbIDn9g3FMBYS/3b766cc608dcfdea5549c7232f35dff2/RepeatingAutomations__1___1_.gif)

### See who has access to your doc 👀

We made it really obvious who has access to your doc (and what type of access they have) in the `Share` menu so you never get a “need access” note again.

![share access](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6RnzjnJkaHOUExCsZ8lE2D%2F9dd2db7bb1d07dab0b535c06f8c0b484%2Fwhats-new-access__1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### **Limit what form respondents see**

Now you can restrict viewing privileges so others in your workspace only see their own submissions—not the entire database of responses!

![whats-new-forms (1)](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F613Ltb3jno86p9AVnTYwXi%2Fd2313d9307cd1f5ee1da0d5dccb41064%2Fwhats-new-forms__1_.png&w=3840&q=75)

### **More reasons to replace your scheduling app**

You can now set an expiration date for your scheduling link and how far into the future people can schedule a meeting with you in Notion Calendar. [Download Notion Calendar →](https://www.notion.com/product/calendar)

![calendar set](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1d5P5pXBwbMTnUbFUM8qZ3%2Fe936ec92f2747c6c990476ad2f90d8b9%2Fwhats-new-calendar.png&w=3840&q=75)

### More improvements to start the year!

*   If your automation has errors, we’ll now show you helpful tips so you can fix it!
    
*   We added the ability to search your settings from the `•••` menu.
    
*   When you make a form that allows respondents to select more than one answer to a question, you can now limit the number of options people can select.
    
*   In the Android app’s inbox, you can now swipe left or right to act on notifications.
    
*   When you make a button, you can now set it to insert a block at the top or bottom of your page.

# Travel blogger Ceci Saia uses notes to turn ideas into adventure

Travel blogger Ceci Saia uses notes to turn ideas into adventure
================================================================

Hundreds of thousands of subscribers count on Ceci Saia for detailed, honest reviews of her travel experiences. The Spain-based travel blogger takes dozens of domestic and international trips per year, producing videos, blogs and city guides about her journeys. She uses Notion as a home for every thought, before, during, and after her trips.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Insights from

![](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F1ezFzeNMQvSbHiTaaH8qmO%2F3a7be0a564ce1fc754bd837118396e63%2Fceci-saia.png&w=96&q=80)

Ceci Saia

Travel blogger

Use cases

Personal Notes

1

Every idea is saved — organized and actionable
----------------------------------------------

For Ceci, trips don't start at takeoff. They begin with an idea — a seed she must water by researching local currency, restaurants, hotels, activities, and more. Before Notion, there wasn't a place to collect all this information. Now, everything associated with each trip has a specific home where the idea can blossom.

![File Folders Illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5lZDj4sbJJVvzghn2RiWGq%2Fd166745f279fa2b08311e5373d96e434%2Ffile-folders.png&w=1080&q=75)

All the important information for every trip Ceci takes is stored in one place.

### She takes notes quickly in Notion

For instance, each location has its own Notion page. There, she'll collect all the relevant articles, images or videos that might inform her planning. And when she's actually embarked on the trip, that page moves with her, serving as the updatable home for all her thoughts while she's in motion. She can quickly take notes, change plans, and make sure all her learnings are documented.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-rectangle.png)

Notion is the place where I gather anything at any stage, like an idea for a trip or things I'm discovering along the way.

2

Notes that learn and adapt with you
-----------------------------------

As soon as Ceci steps on a plane, she starts her review process. Before Notion, she'd wrack her brain to remember what it was she was supposed to take note of — was it the seats? Legroom? Maybe the check-in process? What was previously a knot of to-do's has now become a repeatable system in Notion.

![plant growing illustration](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F6HgTARmCu6bs7JCt9cQJhX%2F3eb4046d9177de44f691e1c3bdb3455a%2Fplant.png&w=1080&q=75)

Ceci uses templates so she never forgets what to review.

### Custom templates keep her on track

Ceci uses a Notion template to make sure she's reviewing the right things whenever she's on a flight, at a restaurant, or has an experience. The template is a collection of what she has learned from all her past travels. It helps guide her mind, enabling her to spend time actually thinking about the experience instead of remembering what it is she needs to review in the first place. And if she realizes something's not on the list? She can easily add it to the Notion template to make sure it gets reviewed next time.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-right-oval.png)

Notion templates are like my own personal assistant. They make sure I have what I need to do a review, instead of just a bunch of random notes.

3

Tools to bring important information to the surface
---------------------------------------------------

Once a trip is over, it's time for Ceci to collect snippets from her experience and turn them into a cohesive blog post or video for her audience. Because she takes such extensive notes, it can be overwhelming to see hundreds of words on a page and figure out how to turn them into a story. With Notion, she has a toolkit to help her quickly parse and curate what she's written down.

![Bookshelf](https://www.notion.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fspoqsaf9291f%2F5YqnDK85MAPMBq4Yt94gsm%2Fadc95daa0dabc8eb984246a38e2a6d6e%2Fbookshelf.png&w=1080&q=75)

Ceci uses Notion’s highlighting and drag-and-drop features to edit her work.

### It's easy to order her thoughts

Ceci's favorite features for this are drag-and-drop, highlighting, and commenting.

To make sense out of a wall of notes, she uses drag-and-drop to begin shaping the story — rearranging the pieces into a cogent outline. Once that's organized, she'll highlight the points she knows she wants to hit. And throughout, she'll leave comments as guideposts for her future self about how she wants to use material. Notion helps Ceci give structure to her notes and weave them into a greater whole.

![](https://www.notion.com/front-static/pages/case-studies/quote-left-blob.png)

Notion makes it easy to go through my notes visually, which is very important for how I work.

Get started building your own notes system
------------------------------------------
